year.year: The calendar year in which the educational topic was offered, indicating the time context for the topic.

category.category: The broader subject area or discipline under which the topic falls, classifying the topic into a specific educational domain.

topic.topic: The specific educational subject or module being taught, serving as the primary identifier for each row in the table.

level.level: The educational level at which the topic is intended, categorizing it as Primary, Secondary, or Tertiary.

year.year: A unique identifier representing the calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary key for each record.

industry1.industry1: A categorical attribute indicating the industry sector (e.g., manufacturing, others, construction, services) associated with the recorded total paid hours for that year.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: A quantitative measurement of the total paid hours recorded for the specified industry in the given year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the record applies, serving as the primary identifier for each entry.

level_1.level_1: A categorical classification indicating the demographic or group category associated with the record, such as Total, Indians, Chinese, Others, or Inter-Ethnic.

level_2.level_2: The month of the year, representing the temporal sub-division within the year for the record (e.g., January, February, etc.).

value.value: A numeric measurement or count corresponding to the combination of year, level_1, and level_2.

month.month: The reporting period (year-month) indicating when the coverage measurement was taken, acting as a temporal attribute for the telco.

telco.telco: The name of the telecommunications provider, serving as the primary entity for which coverage metrics are recorded.

service_coverage.service_coverage: The percentage of service coverage achieved by the telco during the specified month, representing a quantitative measurement of network reach.

query_table.query_table: The name of the table that contains the main subject column (query_column), indicating the source dataset for the mapping.

candidate_table.candidate_table: The name of the table that contains the column matched to query_column, indicating the target dataset for the mapping.

query_column.query_column: The column in query_table that is being matched to another column; it serves as the primary subject of each mapping record.

candidate_column.candidate_column: The column in candidate_table that is considered equivalent to query_column, representing the matched attribute across tables.

year.year: The calendar year during which the certification data was recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for the dataset.

types_of_workers_covered.types_of_workers_covered: A categorical description of the group of workers for whom certification counts are reported, such as 'Professionals, Managers, Executives & Technicians' or 'Production & Transport Operators, Cleaners & Labourers'.

no._certified.no._certified: The numeric count of workers certified within the specified type and year; values may be missing for some records.

quarter.quarter: Represents the fiscal quarter (e.g., 1990-Q3) during which the recorded data applies, serving as the primary time reference for the dataset.

industry1.industry1: Denotes the primary industry classification for the quarter, categorizing the economic sector (e.g., services, manufacturing, others).

industry2.industry2: Specifies the secondary or sub‑industry classification within the primary sector for the quarter (e.g., financial intermediation, hotels and restaurants).

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: Quantifies the total paid hours recorded for the specified quarter and industry combination, indicating labor hours worked.

epi_year.epi_year: The calendar year corresponding to the epidemiological week, indicating the temporal context of the observation.

epi_week.epi_week: The week number within the epidemiological year, serving as the primary identifier for each observation.

status.status: A categorical label describing the nature of the week (e.g., 'COVID', 'Non-COVID', or 'Empty'), classifying the week’s health status.

count.count: A numeric measurement representing the count (e.g., cases, deaths, or other metric) associated with the week, quantifying the observed value.

year.year: The calendar year during which the average annual mileage was recorded, representing a temporal attribute of the vehicle type.

vehicle_type.vehicle_type: The classification of a vehicle (e.g., Cars, Heavy Goods Vehicle, Private Hire Buses, Motorcycles), serving as the primary entity for the dataset.

average_annual_mileage.average_annual_mileage: The mean distance traveled per year by vehicles of the specified type in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of vehicle usage.

year.year: The calendar year during which the overtime paid hours were recorded, indicating the time period for the industry data.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry sector classification for the specific industry, providing a high-level categorical context.

industry2.industry2: The intermediate industry classification that further refines the sector for the specific industry.

industry3.industry3: The specific industry category for which overtime paid hours are reported, serving as the primary entity identifier.

overtime_paid_hours.overtime_paid_hours: The average or total number of overtime hours paid within the specific industry during the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of overtime labor.

quarter.quarter: Represents the fiscal quarter (e.g., 2015-Q2) during which the overtime data was recorded, serving as the primary time reference for the dataset.

industry1.industry1: The top-level industry classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) describing the broad sector associated with the overtime hours, acting as a categorical attribute of the quarter.

industry2.industry2: A secondary industry classification providing a more specific sector within industry1 (e.g., information and communications), serving as a subcategory attribute of the quarter.

industry3.industry3: A tertiary industry classification offering the most detailed sector description within industry2 (e.g., it and other information services), further refining the categorical context of the quarter.

overtime_paid_hours.overtime_paid_hours: The measured amount of overtime hours paid during the specified quarter for the associated industry classifications, representing a quantitative value linked to the quarter.

year.year: The calendar year during which the average absenteeism metrics were recorded, indicating the time period for the data.

type_of_employee.type_of_employee: The classification of employees (e.g., management and executive, rank‑and‑file) for which absenteeism statistics are reported, serving as the primary entity of the table.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The specific leave category (hospitalisation leave or outpatient sick leave) applied to employees in that year, categorizing the type of absence.

avg_days_per_absentee.avg_days_per_absentee: The average number of days taken off per absentee within the specified employee type and leave category for the given year, measuring absentee duration.

avg_days_per_employee.avg_days_per_employee: The average number of days of sick leave per employee in the specified employee type and leave category for the given year, indicating overall absenteeism burden.

level_no.level_no: The hierarchical level number indicating the entity's position within a corporate structure, describing a characteristic of the entity.

block.block: The block identifier used for grouping or categorizing entities, representing an attribute of the entity.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal form of the entity (e.g., Sole Proprietor, Partnership), describing a property of the entity.

entity_name.entity_name: The name of the entity, serving as the primary identifier for each company in the dataset.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current operational status of the entity (e.g., Live Company, Cancelled, Struck Off), describing a characteristic of the entity.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification code assigned to the entity, categorizing its main business activity.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary Standard Industrial Classification code for the entity, providing additional classification of its business activities.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers associated with the entity, measuring the size of its leadership team.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population count is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

population_by_gender.population_by_gender: The gender classification (Male or Female) of the population group being counted, categorizing the data within each year.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The numeric count of individuals in the specified gender group for the given year, representing the population size.

year.year: Represents the calendar year for which employment hour data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: Describes the industry sector (e.g., manufacturing, services) associated with the employment data for that year, acting as a categorical attribute of the main subject.

nature_of_employment.nature_of_employment: Indicates the employment type (e.g., part-time, full-time, all) for the workforce in that year, serving as a categorical attribute of the main subject.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The total number of paid hours worked by employees in that industry and employment type during the year, a quantitative measurement related to the main subject.

standard_hours.standard_hours: The standard (expected) number of hours for employees in that industry and employment type during the year, a quantitative measurement related to the main subject.

overtime_of_all_employees.overtime_of_all_employees: The total overtime hours worked by all employees in that industry and employment type during the year, a quantitative measurement related to the main subject (missing values represented by “-”).

overtime_of_employees_who_worked_overtim.overtime_of_employees_who_worked_overtim: The overtime hours worked by employees who actually worked overtime in that industry and employment type during the year, a quantitative measurement related to the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year for which the computer access data was collected, serving as the primary time reference for each record.

number_of_computer.number_of_computer: A categorical description of the number of computers available to respondents in the household during that year (e.g., 'no computer', '1 computer', '2 or more computers').

computer_access_at_home.computer_access_at_home: A numeric value indicating the proportion or count of households with computer access at home for the specified year and computer category.

month.month: The month (in YYYY-MM format) indicating when the measurement was recorded, representing the temporal context for the material's value.

level_1.level_1: The name or description of the material type, serving as the primary identifier for each material record.

value.value: The numeric quantity associated with the material for that month, measuring the amount or usage of the material.

year.year: The calendar year indicating when the employment count was recorded, acting as a temporal attribute for the employment category.

type.type: The category of employment, such as Photography or Fine Art, Crafts & Collectibles, serving as the primary identifier for each employment record.

employment.employment: The number of employees in the specified category for the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of employment.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year associated with the housing data for the town, indicating the time period of the record.

town_or_estate.town_or_estate: The name of the town or estate, serving as the primary identifier for the location of the housing units.

hdb_or_dbss.hdb_or_dbss: The type of housing scheme—either HDB or DBSS—describing the category of the units in the town.

status.status: The construction status of the housing units in the town, such as 'Under Construction' or 'Completed'.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The number of housing units available or constructed in the town for the given year and scheme.

year.year: The calendar year during which the average water quality measurement was recorded, indicating the temporal context of the parameter’s value.

water_quality_parameter.water_quality_parameter: The specific chemical or physical indicator measured in the water sample, serving as the primary entity for each record.

average_value.average_value: The mean concentration or level of the water quality parameter for the specified year, representing the quantitative measurement.

unit.unit: The unit of measurement associated with the average_value, specifying how the parameter’s concentration is expressed.

month.month: The month and year of the observation, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The category label for the measurement, indicating the type of data recorded; in this table it is consistently 'Total'.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the month and category, representing the quantified value for that period.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the agency that issued the UEN, linking the entity to its regulatory authority.

uen.uen: A unique identifier for each business entity, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

entity_name.entity_name: The registered name of the business entity.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: The classification of the entity (e.g., Business, Local Company).

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal constitution of the entity (e.g., Sole Proprietor, Partnership).

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current status of the entity (e.g., Live, Cancelled, Ceased).

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date the entity was registered or incorporated, indicating its inception.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date the UEN was issued to the entity.

address_type.address_type: The type of address provided (e.g., LOCAL).

block.block: The block number part of the entity’s address.

street_name.street_name: The street name part of the entity’s address.

level_no.level_no: The level number within the building, part of the address.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is located.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code of the entity’s address.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges recorded against the entity.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification code for the entity’s main activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: A textual description of the primary SSIC activity.

auxiliary_industry_code.auxiliary_industry_code: An auxiliary industry code indicating secondary business activity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A textual description of the secondary SSIC activity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers associated with the entity.

year.year: The calendar year for which employment data is reported, serving as the primary time reference for each record.

level_1.level_1: A constant descriptor indicating the overall employment category of enterprises, specifying that the data pertains to total employment of enterprises.

level_2.level_2: A categorical attribute distinguishing between local and foreign enterprise employment within the total employment category.

value.value: The numeric employment figure (in millions or appropriate units) representing the employment count for the specified year and category.

date_figure.date_figure: The date of the COVID‑19 data snapshot, serving as the primary key for each record.

confirmed_total.confirmed_total: The cumulative number of confirmed COVID‑19 cases up to that date, representing the total case count.

daily_cases.daily_cases: The number of new COVID‑19 cases reported on that specific date, indicating daily incidence.

discharge_volume.discharge_volume: The number of patients discharged from hospitals on that date, reflecting daily discharge activity.

discharge_total.discharge_total: The cumulative total of patients discharged from hospitals up to that date, showing overall discharge count.

hospitalised_total.hospitalised_total: The cumulative number of patients currently hospitalized with COVID‑19 up to that date, indicating total hospital burden.

hopitalised_critical.hopitalised_critical: The cumulative number of patients in critical condition among those hospitalized up to that date (note the column name is misspelled).

hospitalised_stable.hospitalised_stable: The cumulative number of patients in stable condition among those hospitalized up to that date, indicating non‑critical cases.

year.year: The calendar year for which the annual leave entitlement distribution is reported, indicating the time period of the data.

industry1.industry1: The primary industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) associated with the distribution of annual leave entitlement.

industry2.industry2: The specific sub-industry or sector within the primary industry, providing more detailed context for the entitlement distribution.

annual_leave_entitlement.annual_leave_entitlement: The category of annual leave entitlement (e.g., '15 to 21 days', '14 days & below', 'over 21 days') being measured, serving as the main subject of the distribution data.

distribution.distribution: The percentage (as a decimal) representing the proportion of employees in the specified industry and year who fall into the given annual leave entitlement category.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The agency that issued the UEN, typically ACRA, describing the authority responsible for the entity’s registration.

uen.uen: A unique identifier for each business entity, serving as the primary key for tracking individual companies.

entity_name.entity_name: The registered name of the business entity, identifying the company in official records.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: The classification of the entity (e.g., Local Company, Business), indicating its legal structure.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current status of the entity (e.g., Live Company, Struck Off, Cancelled), reflecting its operational state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date and time the entity was registered or incorporated, marking its official start.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date the UEN was issued to the entity, indicating when the registration was formalized.

address_type.address_type: The type of address used for the entity (e.g., LOCAL), categorizing the address format.

street_name.street_name: The street name of the entity’s address, specifying the location on the street.

level_no.level_no: The level number within a building for the entity’s address, indicating vertical location.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number within a building for the entity’s address, identifying the specific unit.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is located, providing additional address context.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code for the entity’s address, used for mail delivery and location identification.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges recorded against the entity, measuring regulatory or legal actions.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification code, categorizing the entity’s main industry.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary SSIC code, indicating an additional industry classification for the entity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A textual description of the secondary SSIC code, detailing the secondary industry activity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers associated with the entity, measuring its governance size.

service_type.service_type: The category of services the organisation offers (e.g., Care and Support Services, Others). It describes the type of support the organisation provides.

organisation.organisation: The name of the organisation; it uniquely identifies the primary entity in the table.

address.address: The physical mailing address of the organisation, giving its location.

general_line.general_line: The main telephone contact numbers for the organisation, often including multiple lines separated by spaces or newlines.

enquiry_email.enquiry_email: The email address(es) used for general enquiries to the organisation, sometimes listing multiple addresses.

website.website: The URL of the organisation's website, providing an online point of contact.

services.services: A description of the specific services offered by the organisation, often listing multiple items separated by commas or newlines.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the Singapore Housing Survey, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of residential units (e.g., 1-room, 2-room, Executive, etc.) within a given year, describing the type of flat associated with the household count.

no_of_households.no_of_households: The count of households that own or occupy flats of the specified type in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement for that year and flat type.

quarter.quarter: The fiscal quarter during which the allocation and returns were recorded, serving as a temporal attribute for the industry data.

industry.industry: The name of the industry sector, identifying the primary entity for which allocation and returns are reported.

gross_allocation.gross_allocation: The monetary amount allocated to the industry in the specified quarter, representing a quantitative measure of investment or funding.

returns.returns: The financial return generated by the industry during the quarter, expressed as a monetary value; may be missing for some records.

quarter.quarter: Represents a specific fiscal quarter (e.g., 2021-Q1), serving as the primary time identifier for the dataset.

industry1.industry1: Categorizes the industry sector for the quarter, such as manufacturing or construction, describing the economic domain of the job vacancies.

year.year: A calendar year indicating when the financial metric was recorded, serving as the primary time reference for the data.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group of the individual, describing the age range of the person.

socialnetwork_dp03.socialnetwork_dp03: Indicates whether the individual uses social networks, categorizing them as 'Yes' or 'No'.

product_name.product_name: The name or designation of the product, uniquely identifying each item in the dataset.

dosage_form.dosage_form: The physical form of the product (e.g., Capsule, Tablet, or Nil), describing how the product is administered.

dosage_form_colour.dosage_form_colour: The color(s) of the dosage form, indicating visual characteristics of the product.

dosage_form_shape.dosage_form_shape: The shape of the dosage form (e.g., Oblong, Teardrop, Diamond, Triangle), describing its physical geometry.

dosage_form_marking.dosage_form_marking: A flag indicating whether the dosage form has a marking (Yes/No), representing labeling or identification features.

adulterant_type.adulterant_type: A list of substances found as adulterants in the product, indicating potential contaminants or added ingredients.

manufacturer_name.manufacturer_name: The name of the company that manufactures the product, identifying the producer.

manufacturer_country.manufacturer_country: The country where the manufacturer is located, indicating geographic origin.

year.year: The calendar year for which the financial metric is reported, serving as the primary time dimension of the dataset.

level_2.level_2: A detailed SSIC code grouping and description (e.g., SSIC 472/4752/4774/4776/4777/479 - Others) that further classifies the financial metric, also an attribute of the yearly record.

year.year: The calendar year during which the breastfeeding data was collected, serving as the primary identifier for each set of observations.

exclusive_breastfeeding.exclusive_breastfeeding: The proportion (as a decimal) of mothers exclusively breastfeeding at the specified time interval, representing a quantitative measurement of exclusive breastfeeding prevalence.

any_breastfeeding.any_breastfeeding: The proportion (as a decimal) of mothers breastfeeding (exclusive or partial) at the specified time interval, representing a quantitative measurement of overall breastfeeding prevalence.

year.year: The calendar year during which the births were recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

father_nationality.father_nationality: The nationality of the father for the recorded births, describing the paternal origin in each yearly record.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births occurring in that year for the specific mother‑father nationality pair, representing the quantitative measure of births.

net_wdl_amt.net_wdl_amt: The net withdrawal amount (in monetary units) associated with the scheme type for the specified year, representing the financial value of withdrawals.

est_count.est_count: The estimated count of cases (or events) for the specified epidemiological week, representing the quantitative measurement for that week.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Specifies the legal constitution of the business (e.g., Partnership, Sole Proprietor), indicating its organizational structure.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: Current status of the entity (e.g., Active, Dissolved, Struck Off), reflecting its operational state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: Date when the entity was registered or incorporated, marking its inception.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: Date when the UEN was issued to the entity, indicating when it became officially recognized.

address_type.address_type: Classification of the address type (e.g., LOCAL), describing the nature of the location.

block.block: Block number or identifier within the address, specifying the location within a larger area.

street_name.street_name: Name of the street where the entity is located, providing the primary address detail.

level_no.level_no: Level or floor number of the entity's premises, indicating vertical positioning.

unit_no.unit_no: Unit or apartment number within the building, identifying the specific location.

building_name.building_name: Name of the building where the entity is situated, adding context to the address.

postal_code.postal_code: Postal code of the entity's address, used for mail routing and location identification.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: Number of legal charges or liens registered against the entity, indicating financial encumbrances.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: Primary Standard Industrial Classification code for the entity's main business activity, categorizing its industry.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: Description of the primary SSIC code, elaborating on the main business activity.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: Secondary SSIC code representing additional business activity, indicating diversification.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: Description of the secondary SSIC code, detailing the secondary business activity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: Number of officers or directors associated with the entity, reflecting its governance structure.

distance.distance: A range of travel distances (e.g., '35.3 km - 36.2 km') indicating the segment for which the fare rates apply.

adult_card_fare_per_ride.adult_card_fare_per_ride: The fare charged per adult passenger using a card for a single ride within the specified distance range.

adult_cash_fare_per_ride.adult_cash_fare_per_ride: The fare charged per adult passenger paying cash for a single ride within the specified distance range.

senior_citizen_card_fare_per_ride.senior_citizen_card_fare_per_ride: The fare charged per senior citizen passenger using a card for a single ride within the specified distance range.

senior_citizen_cash_fare_per_ride.senior_citizen_cash_fare_per_ride: The fare charged per senior citizen passenger paying cash for a single ride within the specified distance range.

student_card_fare_per_ride.student_card_fare_per_ride: The fare charged per student passenger using a card for a single ride within the specified distance range.

student_cash_fare_per_ride.student_cash_fare_per_ride: The fare charged per student passenger paying cash for a single ride within the specified distance range.

workfare_transport_concession_card_fare_.workfare_transport_concession_card_fare_: The fare charged per workfare transport concession passenger using a card for a single ride within the specified distance range.

workfare_transport_concession_cash_fare_.workfare_transport_concession_cash_fare_: The fare charged per workfare transport concession passenger paying cash for a single ride within the specified distance range.

persons_with_disabilities_card_fare_per_.persons_with_disabilities_card_fare_per_: The fare charged per passenger with disabilities using a card for a single ride within the specified distance range.

persons_with_disabilities_cash_fare_per_.persons_with_disabilities_cash_fare_per_: The fare charged per passenger with disabilities paying cash for a single ride within the specified distance range.

year.year: The calendar year in which the immunisation coverage was measured, indicating the time context of the data.

immunisation_type.immunisation_type: The name of the specific immunisation (e.g., Diphtheria, Hepatitis B) being reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

percent.percent: The percentage of the target population that received the immunisation in the specified year, representing coverage level.

period_start.period_start: The starting year of the observation period, indicating when the data collection began for this income quintile. It is a temporal attribute of the main subject.

period_end.period_end: The ending year of the observation period, marking when the data collection concluded for this income quintile. It is a temporal attribute of the main subject.

income_quintile.income_quintile: The income quintile category (e.g., 1st quintile, 2nd quintile, All Households) representing the income group for which the healthcare expenditure percentage is reported. It serves as the main subject identifier.

percentage_expenditure_on_healthcare.percentage_expenditure_on_healthcare: The proportion of total household expenditure allocated to healthcare, expressed as a percentage, for the specified income quintile during the given period. It is a measurement attribute of the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year for which admission data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

admissions_by_gender.admissions_by_gender: The gender classification (Male or Female) of the admissions counted for the specified year, categorizing the data by gender.

number_of_admissions.number_of_admissions: The count of admissions recorded for the specified year and gender, representing the quantitative measure of admissions.

year.year: The calendar year in which the trade dispute occurred, indicating the time context for the dispute type.

nature_of_trade_disputes.nature_of_trade_disputes: The specific type or category of trade dispute, serving as the primary entity identifier for each record.

no._awarded.no._awarded: A numeric indicator showing whether an award was granted for the dispute (0 = no award, 1 = award granted), representing the outcome of the dispute.

year.year: The calendar year during which the releases were recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

releases_by_gender.releases_by_gender: The gender category (Male or Female) of the releases counted for that year, describing the demographic classification of the releases.

number_of_releases.number_of_releases: The total count of releases for the specified gender in the given year, representing the quantitative measure of releases.

financial_year.financial_year: The calendar year during which the tax was collected, indicating the time period for the tax data.

tax_type.tax_type: The category or type of tax collected, serving as the primary entity for this dataset (e.g., Property Tax, Income Tax - Corporate Income Tax).

tax_collected.tax_collected: The monetary amount of tax collected for the specified tax type in the given year, representing the measurement of tax revenue.

year.year: The calendar year for which job vacancy data is reported, serving as the primary key that uniquely identifies each record.

industry1.industry1: The top-level industry classification for the job vacancies, describing the broad sector in which the positions are located.

industry2.industry2: A more specific industry category within industry1, providing additional detail about the sector of the job vacancies.

industry3.industry3: An even more detailed subcategory of industry2, further specifying the industry context for the job vacancies.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupational group of the job vacancies, indicating the type of work or role for which positions are available.

job_vacancy.job_vacancy: The number of job vacancies reported for the given year, industry, and occupation combination, representing a quantitative measure of employment opportunities (a dash indicates missing data).

year.year: A unique identifier for each record, indicating the calendar year of the reported metric.

level_1.level_1: A categorical descriptor specifying the type of operating metric (Operating Receipts or Operating Surplus) for the SSIC 47 - Total Retail Trade sector in that year.

value.value: The monetary amount (in the dataset’s currency) corresponding to the metric defined in level_1 for the specified year.

year.year: The calendar year when the financial metric was recorded, indicating the time dimension for the health service type.

level_1.level_1: The category of financial metric (e.g., Value Added, Operating Receipts) associated with the health service type, classifying the type of financial data.

level_2.level_2: The specific health service type identified by its SSIC code and description, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

value.value: The numeric value of the financial metric for the specified health service type in the given year, representing the measured amount.

period.period: A unique time identifier (month-year) for each ARV record, serving as the primary key.

region.region: The geographic region (e.g., EUROPE, ASIA) associated with the ARV count, an attribute of the period.

cor.cor: The country or country group within the region (e.g., Russian Federation, Germany), an attribute of the period.

age_group.age_group: The age range of individuals (e.g., Age 15 - 19, Age 65 & Above) for whom the ARV count applies, a categorical attribute of the period.

arv_count.arv_count: The numeric count of antiretroviral cases recorded for the specified period, region, country, and age group, representing a measurement value of the period.

quarter.quarter: Represents the fiscal or calendar quarter (e.g., 2021-Q1) during which job vacancy data were collected, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: Describes the industry sector (e.g., services, manufacturing, construction, others, total) associated with the vacancy rate for the specified quarter, acting as a categorical attribute of the main subject.

occupation1.occupation1: Specifies the occupation group (e.g., professional, managers, executive and technicians; production and transport operators, cleaners and labourers; clerical, sales and services workers) linked to the vacancy rate for the quarter, serving as a categorical attribute of the main subject.

job_vacancy_rate.job_vacancy_rate: Quantifies the percentage of job vacancies (e.g., 1.8) for the given quarter, industry, and occupation, representing the measurement value related to the main subject.

licence_num.licence_num: A unique identifier for each business licence, serving as the primary key for the licence record.

licensee_name.licensee_name: The name of the entity holding the licence, describing the licence holder.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the licence holder operates, indicating the primary location.

block_house_num.block_house_num: The block or house number of the licence holder's premises, specifying the address component.

level_num.level_num: The level or floor number of the premises, providing vertical location detail.

unit_num.unit_num: The unit number within the building, further identifying the exact location.

street_name.street_name: The street name of the licence holder's address, indicating the horizontal location.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code of the address, used for geographic and mailing purposes.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the survey or data collection, serving as the primary entity for grouping life expectancy statistics.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The ethnic group classification (e.g., Malay, Indian, Others, All) describing the demographic segment for the life expectancy measurement.

gender.gender: The gender classification (Male, Female, All) indicating the sex group for which life expectancy is reported.

lfpr.lfpr: The life expectancy at birth (or similar metric) value for the specified year, ethnic group, and gender, representing the quantitative measurement.

uen.uen: A unique identifier assigned to each business entity, serving as the primary key for identifying the entity.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the agency that issued the UEN, linking the entity to its issuing authority.

uen_status.uen_status: The current status of the UEN (e.g., active, dormant), indicating the entity's operational state.

entity_name.entity_name: The registered name of the business entity, describing what the entity is called.

entity_type.entity_type: The classification of the entity (e.g., BN for business name, LC for limited company), indicating its legal structure.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date on which the UEN was issued, marking the commencement of the entity's registration.

reg_street_name.reg_street_name: The street component of the entity's registered address, specifying its location.

reg_postal_code.reg_postal_code: The postal code of the entity's registered address, providing geographic detail.

year.year: The calendar year for which the income statistics are reported, serving as the primary time reference for the data.

sex.sex: The gender classification (male or female) of the population group whose median income is reported, acting as a categorical attribute of the year.

med_income_incl_empcpf.med_income_incl_empcpf: The median income figure that includes employee CPFs for the specified year and sex, representing a quantitative measurement of earnings.

med_income_excl_empcpf.med_income_excl_empcpf: The median income figure that excludes employee CPFs for the specified year and sex, representing a quantitative measurement of earnings.

quarter.quarter: A unique identifier for each record, representing the specific time period (e.g., 2015‑Q1) for which property price data is recorded.

town.town: The name of the town where the flat is located, providing the geographic context for the record.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of the flat (e.g., 1‑room, 4‑room, Executive), indicating the property type for that quarter.

price.price: The selling price of the flat in that quarter; values may be missing or marked as "‑" when the price is unavailable.

year.year: The calendar year in which the cohort was admitted, indicating the time period for the diploma course statistics.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the cohort, specifying whether the data pertains to male, female, or mixed groups.

diploma_course.diploma_course: The name of the diploma program, serving as the primary entity for which enrollment and graduate statistics are recorded.

intake.intake: The number of students admitted into the diploma course during the specified year, representing the cohort size at entry.

enrolment.enrolment: The number of students actually enrolled in the diploma course during the specified year, indicating participation levels.

graduates.graduates: The number of students who completed the diploma course during the specified year, reflecting graduation outcomes.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique identifier assigned to each survey respondent, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: The respondent’s answer to question 20/212, recorded as a categorical response (e.g., "-" or "No"), representing a specific survey item.

gender.gender: The respondent’s gender classification, indicating whether the respondent identifies as Male or Female.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: A binary indicator of whether the respondent uses the social network identified as dp10, with values "Yes" or "No".

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: A binary indicator of whether the respondent uses the social network identified as dp07, with values "Yes" or "No".

month.month: The month (in YYYY-MM format) indicating the time period for which birth data is recorded, serving as the primary time reference for the dataset.

birth_type.birth_type: The type of birth event, such as 'Single Birth' or 'Twins - 2 Live Births', describing the nature of the delivery for the recorded month.

mother_age_group.mother_age_group: The age range or category of the mother (e.g., '45 - 49', '>=55', '25 - 29'), classifying mothers by age group for the recorded month.

total_number_of_mother.total_number_of_mother: The count of mothers who gave birth in the specified month, birth type, and age group, representing the quantity of births for that combination.

month.month: Represents a specific month in YYYY-MM format, serving as the primary time identifier for each record in the dataset.

category.category: Describes the classification or type of entity counted for that month, such as vehicle categories or taxi counts.

number.number: Indicates the numeric count or quantity associated with the given month and category, representing the measured value for that period.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the net withdrawal amount is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

investment_schm_type.investment_schm_type: The type of CPF investment scheme associated with the withdrawal, indicating whether it is a special or ordinary account.

net_wdl_amt.net_wdl_amt: The net withdrawal amount (in monetary units) for the specified year and scheme type, where negative values represent withdrawals and positive values indicate a net inflow.

ban_q32.ban_q32: Represents the primary classification of the entity, such as business model type (e.g., T2B, Neutral, B2B).

socialnetwork_dp02.socialnetwork_dp02: Indicates whether the entity is present on a specific social network platform (Yes/No).

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: Another categorical attribute of the entity, possibly a secondary classification (e.g., T2B, Neutral).

ban_q435.ban_q435: A binary flag that is consistently false (No), possibly indicating the absence of a particular feature.

ban_education4.ban_education4: Denotes the education level or status of the entity, with values such as Yes, No, or missing (-).

socialnetwork_dp05.socialnetwork_dp05: A binary flag consistently set to No, likely representing the absence of a secondary social network feature.

ban_q431.ban_q431: A binary flag consistently set to No, indicating the absence of a specific attribute.

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: A binary flag consistently set to Yes, indicating the presence of a particular social network slice.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: A binary flag consistently set to No, representing the absence of a specific condition.

identifier_uri.identifier_uri: A Uniform Resource Identifier that uniquely points to the record of this music item, serving as a web address for the resource.

identifier_uuid.identifier_uuid: A universally unique identifier that serves as the primary key for each music record, uniquely identifying the item within the database.

title.title: The title of the music item, describing the name or designation given to the score or recording.

contributor.contributor: A list of individuals and their roles (e.g., arranger, composer, donor) associated with the music item, indicating who contributed to its creation or preservation.

contributor_lcna.contributor_lcna: A cleaned or standardized representation of contributor names, often used for cataloging and authority control.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The organization responsible for digitizing and publishing the music item, typically the National Library Board Singapore.

description.description: A textual description providing details about the music item, such as its content, format, and context.

subject_lcsh.subject_lcsh: Subject headings from the Library of Congress Subject Headings (LCSH) that classify the music item by genre, form, or other thematic categories.

rights.rights: The rights statement indicating copyright status and any restrictions or permissions associated with the music item.

value.value: The numeric index value representing the import price level for the specified year and item group, serving as the measurement of price changes.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the table.

level_1.level_1: A categorical descriptor indicating the type of statistic being reported; in this table it consistently identifies the count of licensed food establishments.

value.value: The numeric count of licensed food establishments for the specified year, representing the measurement of the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year during which judicial executions were recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

types_of_judical_executions.types_of_judical_executions: The category of judicial execution (e.g., MURDER, FIREARMS, DRUG) that occurred in the specified year, describing the nature of the execution.

number_of_judical_executions.number_of_judical_executions: The count of judicial executions of the specified type that took place in the given year, representing the quantitative measure of executions.

month.month: A date in YYYY-MM format indicating the month and year of the measurement, providing the temporal context for the industry data.

level_1.level_1: A constant categorical label ("Total") that specifies the data represents a total figure rather than a sub‑category.

level_2.level_2: The name of the industry sector (e.g., "Electrical Equipment"), serving as the primary entity of the dataset.

value.value: A numeric value (units unspecified) representing the quantitative figure for the industry in the specified month; some records may have missing values.

year.year: The calendar year for which the bride and groom education level pairing is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The education level category of the bride (e.g., University, Post-Secondary, Secondary & Below), describing one side of the couple in the record.

level_2.level_2: The education level category of the groom (e.g., University, Post-Secondary, Secondary & Below), describing the other side of the couple in the record.

value.value: The count of couples that match the specified bride and groom education levels for the given year, representing the quantitative measurement of that pairing.

quarter.quarter: The specific quarter (year and quarter) for which the job vacancy data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry classification for the job vacancy data, describing the main sector of employment during the specified quarter.

industry2.industry2: The subcategory or specific industry within the broader industry1 classification, providing more detailed context for the job vacancy data.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupation category or job type represented in the vacancy data, indicating the workforce segment for the specified quarter.

job_vacancy_rate.job_vacancy_rate: The percentage rate of job vacancies for the specified industry and occupation during the quarter, representing the measurement of labor market demand.

month.month: The month and year (YYYY-MM) indicating the time period for the recorded births, serving as the temporal reference for the data.

mother_race.mother_race: The race or ethnicity of the mother, categorizing births by demographic group within each month.

birth_attendant.birth_attendant: The type of professional who attended the birth, classifying births by the attendant category for each month.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births that occurred in the specified month, mother race, and birth attendant category, representing the quantitative measure of births.

quarter.quarter: Represents a specific three‑month period (e.g., 2010‑Q1) and serves as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

town.town: Specifies the Singapore town or district (e.g., KALLANG/ WHAMPOA) for which the median rent is reported, describing the location attribute of the quarter.

flat_type.flat_type: Indicates the type of flat (e.g., EXEC, 1‑RM, 2‑RM, 3‑RM, 4‑RM, 5‑RM) associated with the median rent, describing the property classification for the quarter.

median_rent.median_rent: Provides the median monthly rent (in Singapore dollars) for the specified quarter, town, and flat type; values may be missing or marked as '-' or 'na'.

service_type.service_type: A categorical label indicating the overall category of services the organisation offers, such as Social Support Services or Care and Support Services.

organisation.organisation: The name of the service provider, uniquely identifying each entity in the table.

address.address: The physical address of the organisation, including street, building, and postal code.

general_line.general_line: Contact telephone number(s) for the organisation, used for general inquiries.

enquiry_email.enquiry_email: Email address for sending inquiries or requests to the organisation.

website.website: URL of the organisation’s official website.

service_1.service_1: Description of the first specific service offered by the organisation; may be empty or marked '-'.

service_2.service_2: Description of the second specific service offered by the organisation; may be empty or marked '-'.

service_3.service_3: Description of the third specific service offered by the organisation; may be empty or marked '-'.

service_4.service_4: Description of the fourth specific service offered by the organisation; may be empty or marked '-'.

service_5.service_5: Description of the fifth specific service offered by the organisation; may be empty or marked '-'.

services_6.services_6: Description of the sixth specific service offered by the organisation; may be empty or marked '-'.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique identifier for each survey respondent, serving as the primary key for this dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: Answer to question 20 question 212, indicating the respondent's response (Yes, No, or missing) about a specific survey item.

gender.gender: The respondent's gender, classified as Male or Female.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: Indicates whether the respondent uses social network DP10 (Yes or No).

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: Indicates whether the respondent uses social network DP07 (Yes or No).

month.month: The month and year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary key for each record.

consumer_numbers.consumer_numbers: The count of consumer accounts or users recorded for that month.

organisation_accounts.organisation_accounts: The count of organisation accounts recorded for that month.

numbers_checked_million.numbers_checked_million: The total number of items checked, expressed in millions, for that month.

month.month: The date (year-month) indicating when the recorded number of vehicles for the make was observed, representing a temporal attribute.

make.make: The manufacturer or brand of a vehicle, serving as the primary entity for each record.

number.number: The count of vehicles produced or sold for the specified make during the given month, serving as a quantitative measurement.

year.year: The calendar year for which the count is recorded, serving as the primary time reference for the data.

category.category: The classification or type associated with the count for that year, describing the category of the items counted.

number.number: The numeric count or quantity associated with the given year and category, representing the measured value.

personalincome.personalincome: The individual's personal income bracket or response status, serving as the primary subject of each record.

ban_age.ban_age: The age group of the individual, categorizing them into specific age ranges (e.g., 16‑24 yo, 25‑34 yo).

socialnetwork_dp03.socialnetwork_dp03: Indicates whether the individual uses social networks, with ‘Yes’ or ‘No’ responses.

article_title.article_title: The title of the article, an attribute describing its content.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the table.

sector.sector: A categorical label indicating the practice status (e.g., 'Active Practice' or 'Not in Active Practice') associated with the year, describing the type of sector for that record.

count.count: The numeric count of entities observed in the specified sector during the given year, representing a quantitative measurement.

no_of_mbrs.no_of_mbrs: The count of members enrolled in the specified investment scheme during that quarter, quantifying participation.

year.year: The calendar year for which purchase data is reported, serving as the primary grouping identifier.

value_of_purchase.value_of_purchase: A categorical description of the purchase amount range for customers in that year, indicating the spending bracket.

type.type: The category of entertainment activity (e.g., Live Performing Arts or Recorded Music), serving as the primary entity for this dataset.

course_category.course_category: The name of the course category, serving as the primary entity for which participant counts are recorded.

no_of_participants.no_of_participants: The number of participants enrolled or attending the course category in the specified year, representing a quantitative measurement of engagement.
