year.year: The calendar year for which the PSLE pass rate data is reported, indicating the time period of the measurement.

race.race: The ethnic group for which the PSLE pass rate is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

percentage_psle_mtl.percentage_psle_mtl: The percentage of students in the specified race who passed the PSLE in the given year, representing the measurement of academic performance.

year.year: The calendar year during which the interest group counts were recorded, serving as a temporal attribute for the interest group type.

type_of_interest_groups.type_of_interest_groups: The name of a specific interest group category, uniquely identifying the main subject entity in this table.

no_of_interest_groups.no_of_interest_groups: The numeric count of interest groups belonging to the specified category in the given year, representing a measurement of the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year for which the educational statistic is reported, indicating the time period of the data.

level_1.level_1: An age and gender classification (e.g., '30-39 Years (Total)') describing the demographic group for the statistic.

level_2.level_2: The education attainment level (e.g., 'Secondary', 'University') associated with the demographic group.

value.value: The numeric value representing the percentage or proportion of the demographic group that has achieved the specified education level.

financial_year.financial_year: The year for which resale transaction data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for the time period of the record.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of the flat (e.g., 1 room, 2 room, 3 room, 5 room, Executive and Multi-generation), describing the type of property associated with the resale transactions.

resale_transactions.resale_transactions: The number of resale transactions that occurred for the specified flat type in the given financial year, representing the quantitative measure of market activity.

year.year: The calendar year when the PSLE math performance was recorded, acting as a temporal attribute for the race categories.

race.race: The race category of students, serving as the primary identifier for the main subject in this dataset. It includes categories such as Overall, Indian, Malay, Chinese, and Others.

percentage_psle_math.percentage_psle_math: The percentage of students in the specified race who achieved the PSLE math score in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of academic performance.

name.name: The full name of the individual associated with the registration number, describing the person’s identity.

reg_no.reg_no: A unique numeric registration number that identifies each individual, serving as the primary key for the table.

firm_name.firm_name: The name of the firm or organization the individual is affiliated with, acting as a foreign key linking to a firm entity.

firm_address.firm_address: The physical address of the affiliated firm, providing location details related to the individual’s firm.

firm_phone.firm_phone: The contact phone number for the affiliated firm, offering a communication channel for the individual’s firm; this field may be missing for some records.

year.year: The calendar year during which the clearance rate was recorded, representing the temporal context for the category.

category.category: The name of a judicial division or overall grouping, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the table.

clearance_rate_percentage.clearance_rate_percentage: The clearance rate expressed as a percentage for the specified category in the given year, indicating the proportion of cases cleared.

quarter.quarter: Represents a fiscal or calendar quarter (e.g., 2022-Q1), serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

ec_completion_status.ec_completion_status: Describes whether the EC was completed or remains uncompleted for the quarter, acting as an attribute of the quarter.

sale_status.sale_status: Indicates the sale outcome for the quarter, such as 'Launched and Sold' or 'Unsold', also an attribute of the quarter.

units.units: Quantifies the number of units associated with the quarter, measuring the volume of sales or inventory, and is a measurement value linked to the quarter.

year.year: The calendar year in which the cases were recorded, indicating the temporal context for the counts.

justice_division.justice_division: The name of the justice division (e.g., CIVIL JUSTICE DIVISION) that categorizes the type of legal jurisdiction; serves as the primary entity for the table.

category.category: A broad classification of case types within a justice division, such as 'Originating Process' or 'Other', describing the nature of the legal matters.

subcategory.subcategory: A more specific sub-classification within a category, detailing particular case types like 'Writs of Summons (DC & MC)' or 'Taxation', providing finer granularity.

count.count: The numeric count of cases or events recorded for the specific combination of year, justice division, category, and subcategory, representing the volume of legal activity.

rankmostimptchild_new_1.rankmostimptchild_new_1: The rank or priority level of the participant's most important child, indicating relative importance among children. It is an attribute of the participant.

prohibit_offspring3.prohibit_offspring3: A flag indicating whether the participant prohibits having offspring, expressed as 'Yes' or 'No'. It is an attribute of the participant.

ban_q28.ban_q28: A categorical description of a person type that the participant may ban or restrict, such as representatives from official institutions or experts. It is an attribute of the participant.

ban_q437.ban_q437: A binary indicator of whether the participant bans a specific category (Yes/No). It is an attribute of the participant.

ban_age.ban_age: The age range of individuals that the participant bans or restricts, expressed in years or age brackets. It is an attribute of the participant.

highestlevel.highestlevel: The highest educational level attained by the participant, such as primary school, polytechnic, university undergraduate, etc. It is an attribute of the participant.

participant_id.participant_id: A unique identifier for each participant, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: The year of birth of the participant, indicating their age cohort. It is an attribute of the participant.

q20_q214.q20_q214: An additional binary or missing response field, possibly indicating a specific survey question outcome; values are 'No' or missing ('-'). It is an attribute of the participant.

year.year: The calendar year for which the demographic rate is reported, serving as the primary time reference for each record.

level_1.level_1: The type of demographic rate measured (e.g., Gross Reproduction Rate, Total Fertility Rate, Net Reproduction Rate), categorizing the nature of the value.

value.value: The numeric value of the specified demographic rate for the given year, representing the measured rate.

year.year: The calendar year when the measurement was recorded, serving as a temporal attribute for the main subject (level_2).

level_1.level_1: A categorical label indicating the type of organization (here always 'Corporation & Individual'), providing context for the main subject.

level_2.level_2: The specific category or sector (e.g., Arts & Heritage, Social & Welfare) that is the primary entity being measured in the table.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the main subject for the given year, representing the quantitative value of that category.

month.month: Represents the year and month of the observation, formatted as YYYY-MM, serving as the primary time reference for each record.

level_1.level_1: Describes the specific tourism metric being reported, in this case 'Total International Visitor Arrivals By Inbound Tourism Markets', acting as a categorical label for the measurement.

value.value: The numeric count of international visitor arrivals for the specified month and metric, measured as a floating-point number.

year.year: The calendar year when the student and teacher counts were recorded, indicating the time period for the data of each school type.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the student population, represented as 'MF' for mixed/female or 'F' for female, describing the demographic aspect of the school type in that year.

school_type.school_type: The classification of the educational institution, such as Specialised, Aided, Govt, Auto, or Specialised Independant, serving as the primary entity for which student and teacher counts are reported.

student_sec.student_sec: The number of students enrolled in the specified school type for the given year and sex, providing a quantitative measure of student population.

teacher_sec.teacher_sec: The number of teachers employed in the specified school type for the given year and sex, offering a quantitative measure of teaching staff.

quarter.quarter: The quarter (year and quarter) representing the time period for the record, serving as the primary identifier for each entry.

res_completion_status.res_completion_status: The completion status of the residential project, indicating that the project is 'Uncompleted Private Residential' for all records.

market_segment.market_segment: The geographic market segment where the project is located, such as 'Rest of Central Region', 'Core Central Region', or 'Outside Central Region'.

units.units: The number of units associated with the project in that quarter, representing the quantity of residential units.

ban_age.ban_age: The respondent's age group, expressed as a range (e.g., '55-64 yo'), describing the age characteristic of the respondent.

socialnetwork_1_slice.socialnetwork_1_slice: A binary indicator of whether the respondent uses social networks, describing a behavioral attribute of the respondent.

md_segment.md_segment: The respondent's segment classification (e.g., 'Purity_Degradation'), categorizing the respondent within a survey-defined group.

livinginsg_3_slice.livinginsg_3_slice: A response indicating the respondent's agreement level with a statement about living conditions, representing a survey attitude attribute.

ban_q434.ban_q434: A yes/no response to question 434, indicating a specific opinion or behavior of the respondent.

levelsch.levelsch: The respondent's highest completed school level (e.g., 'Secondary school'), describing educational attainment.

ban_occupation_status2.ban_occupation_status2: A binary indicator of whether the respondent is currently employed, describing employment status.

ban_education4.ban_education4: A categorical response about education level (e.g., 'Business owner/ Sole proprietor/ Self-employed'), indicating professional status.

ban_education1.ban_education1: A categorical response about education level (e.g., 'None or Primary school'), describing basic educational attainment.

children.children: A yes/no indicator of whether the respondent has children, describing family status.

ban_q28.ban_q28: A textual response describing the respondent's perceived important figure (e.g., 'Someone who is my elder(s) ...'), indicating social influence.

ban_education3.ban_education3: A categorical response about education level (e.g., 'University undergraduate'), describing higher education attainment.

occupation2.occupation2: A categorical description of the respondent's occupation (e.g., 'Blue Collar Skilled'), indicating job type.

livinginsg_2_slice.livinginsg_2_slice: A response indicating the respondent's agreement level with a second living conditions statement, representing another attitude attribute.

q20_q213.q20_q213: A binary or categorical response to a combined question 20/213, indicating a specific survey answer.

rankmostimptchild_2.rankmostimptchild_2: A ranking or importance score for the second child-related question, describing the respondent's prioritization.

sliderliberty_1_slice.sliderliberty_1_slice: A slider value indicating the respondent's stance on liberty, representing a quantitative attitude measure.

socialnetwork_2_slice.socialnetwork_2_slice: A binary indicator of a second social network usage question, describing another behavioral attribute.

ban_q30_2.ban_q30_2: A binary response to question 30 part 2, indicating a specific opinion or behavior.

rankmostimptchild_1.rankmostimptchild_1: A ranking or importance score for the first child-related question, describing the respondent's prioritization.

ban_occupation_role6.ban_occupation_role6: A categorical description of the respondent's occupation role (e.g., 'Representative(s) from official institutions'), indicating professional role.

yearbornin_1_slice.yearbornin_1_slice: The respondent's birth year or age group (e.g., '1957'), providing demographic temporal information.

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: A binary response to question 30 part 4, indicating a specific opinion or behavior.

socialnetwork_dp08.socialnetwork_dp08: A binary indicator of a social network usage question 08, describing another behavioral attribute.

q20_q212.q20_q212: A binary or categorical response to a combined question 20/212, indicating a specific survey answer.

ban_q437.ban_q437: A binary response to question 437, indicating a specific opinion or behavior.

ban_occupation_role5.ban_occupation_role5: A categorical description of the respondent's occupation role (e.g., 'Blue Collar Unskilled'), indicating professional role.

ban_children1.ban_children1: A binary indicator of whether the respondent has one child, describing family size.

ban_q18_q191.ban_q18_q191: A binary or categorical response to questions 18/191, indicating a specific survey answer.

ban_q32.ban_q32: A binary response to question 32, indicating a specific opinion or behavior.

respondent_id.respondent_id: A unique identifier for each survey respondent, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

whichauthority.whichauthority: A textual description of the authority figure the respondent identifies with (e.g., 'Someone who is my elder(s) ...'), indicating perceived influence.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: A binary indicator of a social network usage question 07, describing another behavioral attribute.

highestlevel.highestlevel: The respondent's highest achieved educational level (e.g., 'University postgraduate'), describing educational attainment.

ban_q433.ban_q433: A binary response to question 433, indicating a specific opinion or behavior.

ban_no_ofchildren.ban_no_ofchildren: A numeric or categorical count of the respondent's children, describing family size.

ban_children4.ban_children4: A binary indicator of whether the respondent has four or more children, describing family size.

year.year: The calendar year when the divorce count was recorded, serving as a temporal attribute for the divorce category.

level_1.level_1: The divorce category, indicating the gender group (e.g., 'Total Female Divorcees' or 'Total Male Divorcees'), acting as the primary entity identifier.

value.value: The numeric count of divorcees for the specified category and year, representing a measurement of the divorce category.

month.month: The month and year (YYYY-MM) indicating the time period for which the passenger departure count is recorded, serving as the temporal reference for the data.

level_1.level_1: The type of statistic being reported, here always 'Number Of Air Passenger Departures', describing the measurement category.

level_2.level_2: The broader geographic region (e.g., North East Asia, South East Asia, Europe) where the country is located, classifying the data.

level_3.level_3: The specific country (e.g., China, Philippines, Vietnam, Germany, United Kingdom, Malaysia) for which the departure count is reported.

value.value: The numeric count of air passenger departures for the specified month and country; may be missing for some records.

country.country: The country where the survey respondents are located, serving as the primary subject of the dataset.

q20_q214.q20_q214: The respondent’s answer to question 20 part 214, typically a yes/no or missing response.

yearbornin_1_slice1.yearbornin_1_slice1: The respondent’s age (or birth year slice), expressed as a numeric value.

hhi.hhi: The respondent’s household income bracket or response, such as a dollar range or a statement of no income.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: The respondent’s answer to question 18 part 192, usually a yes/no or missing response.

ban_q435.ban_q435: The respondent’s answer to question 435, typically a yes/no or missing response.

ban_occupation_role2.ban_occupation_role2: The respondent’s occupation role response, often a yes/no or missing value.

socialmedia_dp08.socialmedia_dp08: Indicates whether the respondent uses social media, with 'Yes' or 'No' answers.

ban_q431.ban_q431: The respondent’s answer to question 431, usually a yes/no or missing response.

ban_children4.ban_children4: Indicates whether the respondent has children, with 'Yes' or 'No' answers.

ban_education2.ban_education2: The respondent’s education level response, often a yes/no or missing value.

ban_gender.ban_gender: The respondent’s gender, recorded as 'Male' or 'Female'.

uen.uen: A unique identifier for each business entity, serving as the primary key for the record.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal structure or constitution of the business (e.g., Sole Proprietor), describing the entity identified by uen.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers or directors associated with the business, measuring a characteristic of the entity.

address_type.address_type: The classification of the business’s address, currently all marked as LOCAL, categorizing the entity’s address type.

street_name.street_name: The name of the street where the business is located, describing the business's address as an attribute of the main entity identified by uen.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the agency that issued the UEN, indicating the authority responsible for the business registration; it is an attribute of the main entity.

uen.uen: A unique business registration number that uniquely identifies each business entity, serving as the primary key for the table.

year.year: The calendar year when the survey data was collected, indicating the time period of the measurement.

age.age: The age group of respondents, categorizing participants into ranges such as 15-19 or 60-65.

media_activity.media_activity: The type of media activity surveyed (e.g., Read books, Watch StarHub TV), serving as the primary entity being measured.

sample_size.sample_size: The number of respondents in the specified age group and year who participated in the survey for that media activity.

ever_used.ever_used: The percentage (or proportion) of respondents who have ever used the specified media activity, representing usage prevalence.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: A unique code representing the company's primary industry classification, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the agency that issued the registration, indicating the regulatory authority overseeing the company.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the company is located, providing a physical address reference.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date and time when the company was incorporated, indicating the company's establishment timeline.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges recorded against the company, reflecting its financial or legal encumbrances.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: A secondary industry classification code that provides additional detail about the company's activities, linking to a broader industry taxonomy.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A textual description of the secondary industry classification, elaborating on the company's secondary business activities.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the Singapore Housing Survey (SHS) data collection, serving as the primary key for each record and identifying the time period of the observed percentages.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of residential flat (e.g., All, Executive, 1-room, 2-room, 5-room) for which the percentage applies, acting as an attribute of the survey year.

age_group.age_group: The demographic age range (e.g., Below 15, 15-64, 65 & above) for which the percentage is reported, also an attribute of the survey year.

percentage.percentage: The proportion (in percent) of households within the specified flat type and age group relative to the total for that year, representing a quantitative measurement.

year.year: The model year or relevant year associated with the make, describing when the make was produced or recorded.

make.make: A unique identifier for each car make, serving as the primary key of the table.

number.number: A numeric value representing a quantity related to the make, such as the number of vehicles sold or registered.

year.year: The calendar year for which the fertility rate is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The measurement category, always 'Total Fertility Rate', describing the type of demographic statistic recorded.

level_2.level_2: The age group of women (e.g., '25 - 29 Years') for which the fertility rate applies, categorizing the measurement by age.

value.value: The numeric fertility rate value for the specified year and age group, representing the average number of children per woman in that cohort.

operating_hours.operating_hours: The hours during which the AED is available for use, indicating its operational schedule.

house_number.house_number: The street number of the AED's address, specifying its exact location on the road.

road_name.road_name: The name of the road where the AED is situated, providing the street context for the location.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code corresponding to the AED's address, used for geographic identification.

aed_location_description.aed_location_description: A textual description of the AED's specific location within a building or area, serving as the primary identifier for the AED.

aed_location_floor_level.aed_location_floor_level: The floor level or area designation where the AED is installed, indicating its vertical position within the building.

month.month: A temporal reference indicating the month and year of the recorded bunker sales, acting as the primary key for the dataset.

bunker_type.bunker_type: The classification of the bunker fuel sold during the specified month, describing the product type.

bunker_sales.bunker_sales: The monetary value (or volume) of bunker fuel sales for the given month and type, representing the sales figure.

quarter.quarter: Represents the fiscal quarter (e.g., 2018-Q4) during which the index was recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

property_type.property_type: Categorizes the type of property (e.g., office, retail) associated with the index value for the given quarter.

index.index: A numeric index value reflecting the performance or valuation metric for the specified property type in that quarter.

year.year: The calendar year for which absenteeism statistics are reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for the data.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector (e.g., services, construction, manufacturing) associated with the absenteeism metrics for the given year.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The type of sick leave recorded, such as outpatient sick leave or hospitalisation leave, indicating the nature of the absence.

avg_days_per_absentee.avg_days_per_absentee: The average number of days taken per absentee in the specified year, industry, and leave type, measuring absentee duration.

avg_days_per_employee.avg_days_per_employee: The average number of days of sick leave taken per employee in the specified year, industry, and leave type, indicating overall employee absenteeism.

level_no.level_no: A numeric code indicating the hierarchical level or classification of the entity within the dataset, serving as an attribute of the entity_name.

block.block: An identifier representing a specific block or region associated with the entity, acting as an attribute of the entity_name.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: A textual description of the entity's business constitution (e.g., Sole Proprietor, Partnership), describing a characteristic of the entity_name.

entity_name.entity_name: The official name of the entity, serving as the primary identifier for each record and the main subject of the table.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current legal status of the entity (e.g., Live Company, Struck Off, Cancelled), describing a property of the entity_name.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC) code that categorizes the entity's main business activity, an attribute of the entity_name.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: An optional secondary SSIC code providing additional classification of the entity's business activities, an attribute of the entity_name.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers or directors associated with the entity, representing a quantitative measurement of the entity_name.

year.year: The calendar year during which the population count for the offence group was recorded, indicating the time context of the data.

population_by_main_offence_group.population_by_main_offence_group: The name of the primary offence category, serving as the main subject of the record and identifying the type of crime for which population data is provided.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The numeric count of individuals associated with the offence group in the specified year, representing the measured population size.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each set of age-group counts.

population_by_age_group.population_by_age_group: The age range classification of the population segment for the given year, indicating the demographic group represented.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The numeric count of individuals within the specified age group for that year, representing the population size of that segment.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

total.total: The overall count of the metric for that year, combining both foreign and local components.

foreign.foreign: The count of the metric attributed to foreign sources for that year.

local.local: The count of the metric attributed to local sources for that year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the survey data was collected, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

housing_type.housing_type: The type of housing (public or private) associated with the survey data for that year, categorizing the residential setting.

computer_access_at_home.computer_access_at_home: The percentage of households with computer access at home for the given year and housing type, representing a quantitative measure of technology penetration.

year.year: The calendar year in which the deaths occurred, indicating the time period for the death count.

race.race: The ethnicity or race group of the individuals who died, categorizing the death count by demographic group.

place_of_occurrence.place_of_occurrence: The location type where the deaths took place, such as nursing homes, clinics, or other facilities, classifying the death count by setting.

infant_indicator.infant_indicator: A label indicating whether the deaths were infant deaths or non‑infant deaths, distinguishing the death count by age group.

death_count.death_count: The number of deaths recorded for the specified year, race, place of occurrence, and infant indicator, serving as the primary measurement of the table.

calendar_year.calendar_year: The year in which the count of donees was recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

age_group.age_group: A categorical classification of donees by age range, describing the demographic segment for the recorded year.

number_of_donees.number_of_donees: The quantitative count of donees within the specified age group for the given year, representing the measurement of participation.

year.year: The calendar year for which the operating expenditure data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical label indicating the primary expenditure category, consistently set to 'Operating Expenditure', describing the overarching type of expense.

level_2.level_2: A subcategory or specific expense type within the operating expenditure, such as 'Royalties' or 'Commission & Agency Fees', providing detailed classification of the cost.

value.value: The monetary amount (in unspecified units) associated with the specified subcategory for the given year, representing the measured expenditure value.

month.month: The month and year (YYYY-MM) indicating when the price index was recorded, serving as the temporal reference for the data point.

level_1.level_1: The overarching index category, always 'Domestic Supply Price Index - Overall Items', describing the type of price index measured.

level_2.level_2: The specific item or material category (e.g., 'Crude Materials (Excl Fuels)', 'Machinery & Transport Equipment') for which the price index is reported, serving as the primary subject of each record.

value.value: The numeric value of the Domestic Supply Price Index for the specified item category in the given month, representing the price level relative to a base period.

year.year: The calendar year associated with the recorded data for the police division, indicating the time period of the measurement.

level_1.level_1: The name of the police division (including location and NPC designation), uniquely identifying the primary entity being reported.

value.value: A numeric measurement related to the police division for the specified year (e.g., count or score); some entries may be missing.

agency.agency: The agency column contains the name of the organization offering the service, serving as the primary identifier for each agency.

title.title: The title column lists the specific service or program offered by the agency, describing the service as an attribute of the agency.

description.description: The description column provides a brief explanation or details about the service, describing the service as an attribute of the title.

year.year: The calendar year indicating when the count of the specified grassroots organization type was recorded, providing a temporal context.

grassroots_org_type.grassroots_org_type: The classification of a grassroots organization, serving as the primary identifier for each organization type in the dataset.

no_of_grassroots_org.no_of_grassroots_org: The numeric count of grassroots organizations of the specified type in the given year, representing the size of that organization category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrolment data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

level.level: The educational level within secondary schooling (e.g., Secondary 1, 2, 3, 4, 5), describing the grade tier associated with the enrolment data for that year.

course.course: The type of secondary course offered (e.g., Normal (Tech), Normal (Acad), Express, Special), categorizing the curriculum stream for the enrolments in that year.

sex.sex: The gender classification of students (M, F, or MF indicating mixed), indicating the demographic group represented in the enrolment count for that year.

enrolment_secondary.enrolment_secondary: The numeric count of students enrolled in secondary education for the specified year, level, course, and sex, representing the measurement of enrolment volume.

year.year: The calendar year during which new cases were reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

age.age: The age group classification of individuals affected in that year, describing the demographic segment of the reported cases.

new_cases.new_cases: The count of newly reported cases for the specified year and age group, representing the quantitative measurement of disease incidence.

year.year: The calendar year for which the bride and groom age group pairing data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The bride's age group classification for the record, describing the age range of the bride in the couple pairing.

level_2.level_2: The groom's age group classification for the record, describing the age range of the groom in the couple pairing.

value.value: The numeric count of couples that fall into the specified bride and groom age group pairing for the given year, representing the measurement of this demographic intersection.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the secondary school leaving survey, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The ethnic classification of respondents, categorizing the data within each year.

gender.gender: The gender of respondents, providing a binary classification for each year's data.

percentage.percentage: The percentage value representing the proportion of respondents meeting the survey criterion for the given year, ethnic group, and gender.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the survey or data collection, serving as the primary key for the dataset and indicating the time point for the recorded percentages.

elderly_pop.elderly_pop: A categorical attribute describing the type of elderly population group (e.g., 'Elderly' or 'Future Elderly') for the given year.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: A categorical attribute indicating the ethnicity of the population segment being measured (e.g., Chinese, Malay, Indian, Others).

percentage.percentage: A measurement value expressing the proportion, as a percentage, of the specified elderly population within the given ethnic group for the specified year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

level_1.level_1: The educational attainment category of brides (e.g., 'Brides - Secondary & Below', 'Brides - Post-Secondary', 'Brides - University', or 'Total'), describing the group for which the value applies.

value.value: The count of brides in the specified educational category for the given year, representing the quantitative measurement of that group.

year.year: The calendar year during which the internet usage data was recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each observation.

age.age: The age group classification of respondents, indicating the demographic segment for which the internet usage percentage applies.

internet_usage.internet_usage: The percentage of individuals within the specified age group who use the internet, representing the measured internet usage rate for that year.

name_of_centre.name_of_centre: The unique name of the food centre, serving as the primary identifier for each centre.

location_of_centre.location_of_centre: The physical address of the centre, describing its geographic location.

type_of_centre.type_of_centre: The classification of the centre (e.g., MHC, HC), indicating its operational category.

owner.owner: The entity that owns the centre (e.g., HDB, Government), indicating ownership status.

no_of_stalls.no_of_stalls: The total number of stalls available at the centre, measuring its capacity.

no_of_cooked_food_stalls.no_of_cooked_food_stalls: The count of stalls that serve cooked food within the centre, indicating food service capacity.

no_of_mkt_produce_stalls.no_of_mkt_produce_stalls: The count of stalls that sell market produce within the centre, indicating produce availability.

shs_year.shs_year: The calendar year for which the housing statistics are reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

flat_type.flat_type: The classification of the flat (e.g., 1-room, 2-room, Executive, 3-room, 4-room, 5-room) associated with the year, describing the type of dwelling.

number.number: The count of flats of the specified type available or sold in that year, representing the quantitative measure of housing units.

year.year: The calendar year for which the facility and bed counts are reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

institution_type.institution_type: The broad category of the healthcare institution (e.g., Hospital, Residential Long-Term) associated with the reported facilities and beds for that year.

facility_type_a.facility_type_a: The specific type of facility within the institution category (e.g., Acute, Nursing Homes) that is counted in the record.

no_of_facilities.no_of_facilities: The number of facilities of the specified type present in the given year, representing the count of such establishments.

no_beds.no_beds: The total number of beds available across the facilities of the specified type in that year, indicating capacity.

year.year: The calendar year when the employment data for the degree program was collected, indicating the time context of the statistics.

university.university: The name of the higher education institution offering the degree program, serving as a foreign key linking to the university entity.

school.school: The specific college or school within the university that houses the degree program, acting as a foreign key to the school entity.

degree.degree: The title of the degree program, uniquely identifying the specific academic offering and serving as the primary subject of the table.

employment_rate_overall.employment_rate_overall: The overall employment rate for graduates of the degree program, representing a quantitative measure of employment outcomes.

employment_rate_ft_perm.employment_rate_ft_perm: The employment rate for graduates in full-time permanent positions, providing a more specific employment metric for the degree program.

basic_monthly_mean.basic_monthly_mean: The average basic monthly salary earned by graduates of the degree program, indicating typical earnings.

basic_monthly_median.basic_monthly_median: The median basic monthly salary for graduates, offering a central tendency measure of earnings.

gross_monthly_mean.gross_monthly_mean: The average gross monthly salary earned by graduates, reflecting total compensation before deductions.

gross_monthly_median.gross_monthly_median: The median gross monthly salary for graduates, showing the central point of total compensation.

gross_mthly_25_percentile.gross_mthly_25_percentile: The 25th percentile gross monthly salary for graduates, indicating the lower quartile earnings.

gross_mthly_75_percentile.gross_mthly_75_percentile: The 75th percentile gross monthly salary for graduates, indicating the upper quartile earnings.

year.year: The calendar year in which the recorded counts were observed, serving as the primary key for each time-based record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical label describing the subgroup of interest for that year (e.g., 'Brides - Secondary & Below', 'Brides - Post-Secondary', 'Brides - University', or 'Total').

value.value: The numeric count or measurement associated with the specified year and subgroup, indicating the magnitude of the event for that category.

level_no.level_no: The hierarchical level number indicating the entity's position within a broader organizational structure, serving as an attribute of the entity type.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: The description of the entity type (e.g., Local Company, Business), representing the primary subject of the record.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC) code that categorizes the entity's main business activity, an attribute of the entity type.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: An optional secondary SSIC code providing additional industry classification for the entity, also an attribute of the entity type.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current status of the entity (e.g., Struck Off, Cancelled, Live Company, Live), describing its operational state as an attribute of the entity type.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number associated with the entity, indicating a specific subdivision or location, an attribute of the entity type.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date on which the Unique Entity Number (UEN) was issued, a temporal attribute of the entity type.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges recorded against the entity, a quantitative measurement related to the entity type.

car_park_no.car_park_no: A unique identifier for each car park, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

address.address: The street address of the car park, providing its physical location.

x_coord.x_coord: The X coordinate (easting) of the car park in the local coordinate system, used for mapping.

y_coord.y_coord: The Y coordinate (northing) of the car park in the local coordinate system, used for mapping.

car_park_type.car_park_type: The classification of the parking facility, such as surface or multi‑storey.

type_of_parking_system.type_of_parking_system: The method of payment or access control used at the car park, e.g., electronic or coupon.

short_term_parking.short_term_parking: The time period during which short‑term parking is available, often specified as whole day or specific hours.

free_parking.free_parking: Indicates whether parking is free (YES) or requires payment (NO).

night_parking.night_parking: Indicates whether parking is allowed during nighttime hours (YES) or not (NO).

car_park_decks.car_park_decks: The number of parking decks or levels available at the car park.

gantry_height.gantry_height: The maximum vehicle height (in meters) that can pass through the car park gantry.

car_park_basement.car_park_basement: Indicates whether the car park includes a basement level (Y/N).

year.year: The calendar year during which the births occurred, serving as the primary grouping identifier for the dataset.

period_of_gestation.period_of_gestation: The gestational age in weeks at birth, describing the developmental stage of the newborns within each year.

birth_weight.birth_weight: The weight range of the newborns in grams, indicating the birth weight category for the recorded births.

gender.gender: The biological sex of the newborns, categorizing the births by male or female.

type_of_birth.type_of_birth: The classification of the birth event, indicating whether the newborns were singletons or part of a twin set.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the specific combination of year, gestation period, weight range, gender, and birth type, representing the measurement of birth frequency.

month.month: The month and year (YYYY-MM) indicating the time period for which birth data is recorded, serving as the primary temporal reference for the dataset.

mage.mage: The age range of the mother, expressed as a lower and upper bound (e.g., '40  -  44'), describing the maternal age group for the births counted in that month.

child_gender.child_gender: The gender of the child (M or F), categorizing the births by sex for the specified month and maternal age group.

mrace.mrace: The race or ethnicity of the mother (e.g., CHINESE, OTHERS, MALAYS, INDIANS), classifying the births by maternal demographic group for the month.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the given month, maternal age range, child gender, and mother race, representing a quantitative measurement of births.

year.year: The calendar year for which the median divorce age is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical descriptor indicating the gender (Male or Female) and the measurement type 'Median Age At Divorce', providing context for the value associated with the year.

value.value: The numeric median age at divorce for the specified gender in the given year, representing the central tendency of divorce age.

ban_q32.ban_q32: The respondent's answer to question 32 of the survey, serving as the primary reference point for the other attributes in the row.

socialnetwork_dp02.socialnetwork_dp02: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for dp02, indicating whether they use that platform; an attribute of the main subject.

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: The respondent's answer to sub-question 4 of question 30, providing additional detail about their response; an attribute of the main subject.

ban_q435.ban_q435: The respondent's answer to question 435, capturing a specific survey response; an attribute of the main subject.

ban_education4.ban_education4: The respondent's education level as categorized by the survey's education scale; an attribute of the main subject.

socialnetwork_dp05.socialnetwork_dp05: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for dp05, indicating usage of that platform; an attribute of the main subject.

ban_q431.ban_q431: The respondent's answer to question 431, reflecting a particular survey response; an attribute of the main subject.

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: The respondent's answer regarding social network usage for the 5_slice platform, indicating usage; an attribute of the main subject.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: The respondent's answer to sub-question 192 of question 18, providing additional detail; an attribute of the main subject.

respondent_serial.respondent_serial: A unique identifier for each survey respondent, serving as the primary key for this dataset.

q20_q212.q20_q212: The respondent’s answer to question 20.12, indicating a Yes/No response (or missing), representing a personal attribute of the respondent.

gender.gender: The respondent’s gender, classified as Male or Female, describing a demographic attribute of the respondent.

socialnetwork_dp10.socialnetwork_dp10: The respondent’s answer to social network question dp10, indicating Yes or No, representing engagement with that specific social network.

socialnetwork_dp07.socialnetwork_dp07: The respondent’s answer to social network question dp07, indicating Yes or No, representing engagement with that specific social network.

month.month: Represents the calendar month (YYYY-MM) for which data is recorded, serving as the primary entity identifier for each record.

type.type: Describes the duration classification (e.g., '5 Year' or '10 Year') associated with the month, acting as a categorical attribute of the main subject.

category.category: Specifies the categorical grouping (e.g., 'Category A', 'B', 'C', 'D') linked to the month, serving as another attribute of the main subject.

number.number: Provides the quantitative value or count corresponding to the month, type, and category combination, representing a measurement of the main subject.

vbc.vbc: The statement or question text about freedom of expression, serving as the primary subject of the survey responses.

ban_children4.ban_children4: A categorical response indicating whether children are permitted to express views in the context of the statement, describing a characteristic of the statement.

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: A categorical response reflecting the respondent's stance (e.g., T2B, Neutral, B2B) regarding the statement, representing a measurement of opinion.

ban_q28.ban_q28: A categorical response identifying the type of authority or elder (e.g., official institutions or family members) relevant to the statement, describing a contextual attribute.

ban_q18_q194.ban_q18_q194: A binary Yes/No response indicating compliance or agreement with a specific aspect of the statement, serving as an attribute of the statement.

socialnetwork_1_slice.socialnetwork_1_slice: A binary Yes/No response indicating whether the statement applies to social network contexts, representing an attribute of the statement.

academic_year.academic_year: The calendar year in which the course was offered, indicating the temporal context of the course enrollment.

semester.semester: The academic term (e.g., S1) during which the course took place, providing additional temporal detail for the course offering.

school.school: The academic school or department offering the course, categorizing the course within the university's organizational structure.

jae_course_code.jae_course_code: A unique identifier for each course, serving as the primary key that distinguishes individual courses in the dataset.

course_name.course_name: The descriptive title of the course, providing a human-readable name for the course identified by its code.

gender.gender: The gender of students enrolled in the course, classifying enrollment counts by gender.

enrolment.enrolment: The number of students enrolled in the course for the specified year, semester, school, and gender, representing a quantitative measurement of course participation.

uen.uen: A unique identifier assigned to each business entity, serving as the primary key for identifying the entity.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: An identifier indicating the agency that issued the UEN, linking the entity to its issuing authority.

uen_status.uen_status: The current status of the UEN (e.g., Registered, Deactivated), describing the entity's operational state.

entity_name.entity_name: The registered name of the business entity, identifying the entity in official records.

entity_type.entity_type: A categorical code representing the legal structure of the entity (e.g., BN for Business Name, LC for Limited Company).

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date on which the UEN was issued, indicating when the entity was officially registered.

reg_street_name.reg_street_name: The street name of the entity's registered address, providing location information.

reg_postal_code.reg_postal_code: The postal code of the entity's registered address, used for geographic identification.

year.year: The calendar year indicating when the provider count was recorded, acting as a temporal attribute linked to the service type.

service_type.service_type: The category of care service, such as 'Centre-based Care Facilities' or 'Home Care Providers', serving as the primary entity for which provider counts are reported.

no_of_providers.no_of_providers: The number of care providers operating under the specified service type in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of provider availability.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper that published the article, categorizing the source of the content.

issue_id.issue_id: A foreign key linking the article to its specific issue, identifying the issue in which the article appears.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the issue containing the article, providing temporal context.

edition.edition: The edition number of the issue, indicating the specific edition in which the article was printed.

page_id.page_id: A foreign key referencing the page on which the article appears, identifying the page within the issue.

page_number.page_number: The numeric page number of the article within the issue, measuring its position.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for each article, serving as the primary key for the article entity.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, describing its main topic.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article’s text, providing a brief excerpt of the content.

year.year: The calendar year when the facility count was recorded, indicating the time period for the data.

type.type: The category of healthcare facility (e.g., Nursing Homes, Inpatient Hospices), serving as the primary entity identifier for the counts.

sector.sector: The ownership or operational sector of the facility (Private, Public, Not-For-Profit), categorizing the type.

count.count: The numeric count of facilities of the specified type and sector in the given year, representing the measurement.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date and time when the business was incorporated, representing the temporal founding of the entity and acting as a temporal attribute of the business name.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The count of legal charges recorded against the business, indicating the number of financial encumbrances and serving as an attribute of the business name.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary SSIC code that classifies an additional business activity of the entity, acting as an attribute of the business name.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A textual description of the secondary SSIC code, providing details about the secondary business activity and serving as an attribute of the business name.

year.year: The calendar year during which the investigations were conducted, indicating the time period for the abuse type data.

type_of_abuse.type_of_abuse: The category of abuse investigated, such as emotional and psychological abuse, physical abuse, neglect, or self-neglect, serving as the primary entity for the dataset.

aps_investigation.aps_investigation: The number of APS (Adult Protective Services) investigations recorded for the specified type of abuse in the given year, representing the measurement of investigative activity.

financial_year.financial_year: A fiscal year identifier that serves as the primary key for each record, indicating the time period of the data.

type.type: A categorical attribute specifying whether the applications are for rental or resale, providing classification within the year.

applications_registered.applications_registered: A quantitative measurement of the number of applications registered in that fiscal year and for that type.

year.year: Represents the calendar year for which average monthly earnings are reported, serving as the primary entity identifier for each observation.

sex.sex: Indicates the gender category (male, female, or total) associated with the earnings figure, acting as a categorical attribute of the year.

average_monthly_earnings.average_monthly_earnings: The average monthly earnings amount (in unspecified currency) for the specified year and gender group, serving as a measurement value linked to the year and sex.

level_no.level_no: The hierarchical level number assigned to the entity, indicating its position within a classification system.

block.block: The block identifier associated with the entity, possibly grouping entities by region or category.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal form or constitution of the entity (e.g., Sole Proprietor, Private Limited), describing its organizational structure.

entity_name.entity_name: The name of the business entity, uniquely identifying each company or sole proprietor.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current registration status of the entity (e.g., Live Company, Struck Off, Ceased Registration, Cancelled), indicating its operational state.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Sector Classification (SSIC) code representing the main industry activity of the entity.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary SSIC code indicating an additional industry activity for the entity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers or directors associated with the entity, reflecting its governance size.

quarter.quarter: The fiscal or calendar quarter during which the paid hours were recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: The highest-level industry classification for the recorded hours, describing the broad sector.

industry2.industry2: The second-level industry classification, providing a more specific sub-sector within the top-level industry.

industry3.industry3: The third-level industry classification, offering the most detailed sub-sector categorization for the hours.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The total number of paid hours logged in that quarter for the specified industry classification, representing a quantitative measure of labor hours.

year.year: The calendar year for which overtime paid hours are reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for the dataset.

industry1.industry1: The primary industry classification for the reported overtime hours, categorizing the economic sector (e.g., services, manufacturing, others).

industry2.industry2: The secondary industry classification providing more specific sub‑sector detail within the primary industry (e.g., financial services, electrical products, transport equipment).

overtime_paid_hours.overtime_paid_hours: The average or total number of overtime hours paid in the specified year and industry categories, measured as a numeric value.

quarter.quarter: Represents a specific fiscal quarter (e.g., 2017-Q1), serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

sector.sector: Describes the market sector (Private or Public) associated with the quarter, categorizing the type of entity involved.

type_of_space.type_of_space: Specifies the kind of real‑estate space (Retail Space or Office Space) observed in that quarter, providing a property classification.

availability.availability: Indicates the occupancy status of the space during the quarter (Vacant or Available), reflecting the space's availability condition.

amount_of_space.amount_of_space: Quantifies the total square footage or units of space available or vacant in that quarter, serving as a measurement of space volume.

year.year: The calendar year for which the recruitment and resignation rates are reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: The industry classification (e.g., total, services, manufacturing, construction, others) associated with the rates for that year, describing the sector context.

occupation1.occupation1: The occupation group (e.g., total, professional managers, technicians, production operators, clerical workers) linked to the rates for that year, indicating the workforce segment.

recruitment_rate.recruitment_rate: The percentage of new hires relative to the workforce in that industry and occupation for the specified year, measuring recruitment activity.

resignation_rate.resignation_rate: The percentage of employees who resigned relative to the workforce in that industry and occupation for the specified year, measuring turnover.

year.year: Represents the fiscal year for which the operating expenditure data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: Denotes the primary category of expenditure, consistently labeled as 'Operating Expenditure', providing a high-level classification of the financial outflow.

level_2.level_2: Specifies the detailed subcategory of operating expenditure (e.g., Royalties, Commission & Agency Fees), offering a granular classification within the main category.

value.value: Indicates the monetary amount (in unspecified units) associated with the specified subcategory for the given year, representing the measured expenditure.

from.from: The effective date when the stamp duty rule became applicable, serving as the primary identifier for each regulation entry.

stamp_duty_type.stamp_duty_type: An attribute describing the category of stamp duty (e.g., Additional Buyer's Stamp Duty, Buyer's Stamp Duty) associated with the rule.

document_type.document_type: An attribute specifying the type of legal document covered by the rule, such as Sale & Purchase or Gift of Residential Immovable Property.

transaction_type.transaction_type: An attribute indicating the specific transaction context or buyer group (e.g., Singapore Permanent Residents buying the first residential property) for which the rule applies.

duty_levied_on.duty_levied_on: An attribute detailing the basis on which the duty is calculated, such as purchase price or market value, whichever is higher.

duty_rate.duty_rate: A measurement value representing the percentage rate of the stamp duty; some entries may have missing values.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The identifier of the agency that issued the UEN, linking the entity to its issuing authority.

uen.uen: A unique identifier for each business entity, serving as the primary key for the table.

entity_name.entity_name: The registered name of the business entity, describing its identity.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: A textual description of the entity type (e.g., Business, Local Company), categorizing the entity.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: A description of the legal constitution of the entity (e.g., Sole Proprietor, LLP).

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current status of the entity (e.g., Cancelled, Struck Off), indicating its operational state.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date and time when the entity was registered or incorporated, providing a temporal reference.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date and time when the UEN was issued to the entity, indicating the issuance timestamp.

address_type.address_type: The type of address (e.g., LOCAL) associated with the entity.

block.block: The block number of the entity’s address, part of the location details.

street_name.street_name: The street name of the entity’s address, part of the location details.

level_no.level_no: The level number within the building for the entity’s address, part of the location details.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number within the building for the entity’s address, part of the location details.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is located, part of the address details.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code of the entity’s address, part of the location details.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges recorded against the entity, a quantitative measure.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification (SSIC) code for the entity, categorizing its main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: A description of the primary SSIC code, detailing the main business activity.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary SSIC code for the entity, indicating an additional business activity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A description of the secondary SSIC code, detailing the additional business activity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers associated with the entity, a quantitative measure of its governance structure.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The fiscal year for which the tax assessment data is reported, serving as the primary key for each record.

no_of_companies_assessed.no_of_companies_assessed: The count of companies that were assessed for tax in that fiscal year, indicating the scope of the assessment.

total_income.total_income: The aggregate income of all assessed companies for the year, representing the total taxable base.

donations.donations: The total amount of donations made by the assessed companies during the year, which may affect tax calculations.

ci_before_reliefs_exemption.ci_before_reliefs_exemption: Corporate income before applying reliefs and exemptions for the year, showing the initial taxable income.

group_relief.group_relief: The amount of group relief applied to the corporate income in that year, reducing the taxable base.

loss_carryback_relief.loss_carryback_relief: Relief granted for losses carried back to previous years, impacting the current year's tax liability.

tax_exemption.tax_exemption: The total tax exemption amount applied in the year, further reducing taxable income.

ci.ci: Corporate income after reliefs and exemptions for the year, representing the taxable income used to compute tax.

gross_tax_payable.gross_tax_payable: The total tax payable before deductions and set-offs for the year.

tax_deducted_at_source.tax_deducted_at_source: Tax deducted at source during the year, which is credited against the payable tax.

other_tax_set_offs.other_tax_set_offs: Additional tax set-offs applied in the year, reducing the net tax liability.

net_tax_assessed.net_tax_assessed: The final tax assessed after all deductions and set-offs for the year, representing the amount owed.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population counts are recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

male.male: The number of male individuals counted in that year, representing a quantitative attribute of the population.

female.female: The number of female individuals counted in that year, representing a quantitative attribute of the population.

total.total: The total number of individuals counted in that year, calculated as the sum of male and female counts, serving as a quantitative attribute.

year.year: The calendar year for which the measurement is recorded, indicating the time dimension of the country’s data.

level_1.level_1: A constant label 'Total' indicating that the data represents aggregated totals for the country.

level_2.level_2: The broader geographic region or continent that the country belongs to, classifying the country within a larger area.

level_3.level_3: The name of the country or subregion for which the value is reported, serving as the primary entity identifier.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the country in the specified year, representing the quantity or metric being tracked.

month.month: The month and year representing the time period for the recorded data, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical indicator, consistently set to 'Total', denoting that the value represents an aggregate across all subcategories.

level_2.level_2: The specific category of food establishment (e.g., Cafes, Food Courts & Other Eating Places, Fast Food Outlets, Restaurants, Food Caterers) associated with the recorded value.

value.value: The quantitative measurement (likely revenue or count) for the specified category in the given month, expressed as a numeric value; missing entries indicate unavailable data.

from.from: The effective date from which the duty rule applies, indicating the temporal validity of the rule.

document_type.document_type: The type of conveyance or transaction for which the duty rule is defined, serving as the primary identifier of the rule's context.

underlying_property_definition.underlying_property_definition: A textual description of the definition of 'underlying property' as referenced in the rule, providing legal context for the duty.

duty_levied_on.duty_levied_on: The specific aspect or portion of the property value that the duty is applied to, describing the scope of the duty.

duty_formula.duty_formula: The mathematical expression used to calculate the duty amount based on the property value and other variables.

duty_rate.duty_rate: The percentage or rate applied to the calculated duty amount, expressed as a numeric value.

year.year: The calendar year for which employment change data is reported, serving as the primary time reference for the record.

industry1.industry1: The broad industry sector classification (e.g., services, manufacturing) associated with the employment change for that year.

industry2.industry2: The sub-sector or industry group within the broad sector that further specifies the employment change context for that year.

industry3.industry3: A more detailed industry category or specific service/product group related to the employment change for that year.

employment_change.employment_change: The percentage change in employment (positive or negative) for the specified industry categories during the given year.

year.year: The calendar year in which the expenditure per student was recorded, indicating the time context of the data.

type_of_educational_institution.type_of_educational_institution: The name or classification of the educational institution, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

expenditure_per_student.expenditure_per_student: The amount of money spent per student for the specified institution type in the given year, representing a financial metric.

year.year: The calendar year during which the computer usage data was collected, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

age.age: The age group classification of respondents, describing the demographic segment for which the computer usage percentage is reported.

computer_usage.computer_usage: The percentage of respondents within the specified age group who reported using a computer in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of computer usage.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the survey or data collection, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

elderly_pop.elderly_pop: The classification of the elderly population group for the record, indicating whether the data pertains to Elderly, Future Elderly, or All residents.

flat_type.flat_type: The type of flat (e.g., 1-room, 3-room, 5-room) associated with the percentage figure, describing the housing category.

percentage.percentage: The percentage value representing the proportion of the specified elderly population group residing in the given flat type for that year.

centre_code.centre_code: A unique identifier for each educational centre, serving as the primary key for referencing the centre.

centre_name.centre_name: The official name of the centre, providing a human-readable label for the centre identified by centre_code.

incidental_charges.incidental_charges: A description of the specific charge applied to the centre, such as deposits or optional fees, categorizing the type of fee.

frequency.frequency: The recurrence interval of the charge (e.g., Once, Annually), indicating how often the fee is applied.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the charge in Singapore dollars, representing the cost associated with the specified incidental_charges.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is reported, serving as the primary key that identifies each record.

no_of_inmates_score_wkprg.no_of_inmates_score_wkprg: The count of inmates who received a score in the work program during that year, representing a quantitative attribute of the year's program participation.

percentage_of_inmates_engaged_wkprg.percentage_of_inmates_engaged_wkprg: The proportion of inmates engaged in the work program that year, expressed as a percentage, indicating the program's engagement level for that year.

year.year: A calendar year that uniquely identifies each set of admissions records.

admissions_by_education_level.admissions_by_education_level: The education level category (e.g., No Education, Primary, Secondary, Vocational, Tertiary & Above, Pre University) describing the type of admission for that year.

number_of_admissions.number_of_admissions: The count of admissions recorded for the specified year and education level, representing the quantitative measure of admissions.

year.year: A calendar year that identifies the period of the admission data, serving as the primary key for each record.

admissions_by_gender.admissions_by_gender: The gender (Male or Female) of the admissions counted for that year, categorizing the admissions by gender.

number_of_admissions.number_of_admissions: The total number of admissions for the specified gender in the given year, representing the quantitative measure of admissions.

year.year: Represents the calendar year for which job vacancy data is recorded, serving as the primary time dimension of the dataset.

industry1.industry1: Categorizes the primary industry sector (e.g., services, manufacturing, others) associated with the job vacancies for the given year.

industry2.industry2: Specifies the sub-sector or specific industry category within the primary industry, providing finer classification of the job vacancy data.

occupation1.occupation1: Describes the occupational group (e.g., clerical, sales and services workers, professional, managers, executive and technicians) for which the job vacancies are reported.

job_vacancy.job_vacancy: Quantifies the number of job vacancies available in the specified year, industry, and occupation, serving as the measurement value for the record.

app_no.app_no: The application number for the tobacco license application, uniquely identifying this specific application instance.

licence_no.licence_no: The license number issued to the company, serving as the primary key for identifying the licensed entity.

company_name.company_name: The registered name of the company holding the license, describing the entity associated with the license.

valid_period.valid_period: The validity period of the license, indicating the start and end dates during which the license is active.

company_address.company_address: The registered address of the company, providing the physical location associated with the license.

tobacco_types.tobacco_types: The type(s) of tobacco products covered by the license, categorizing the products the company is authorized to handle.

month.month: The month and year (YYYY-MM) indicating the time period for which birth data is reported, serving as the primary entity for each record.

mother_race.mother_race: The race or ethnicity of the mother, categorizing the birth record by maternal demographic group.

place_of_birth.place_of_birth: The location type where the birth took place, classifying the record by setting such as hospital or residence.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the specified month, mother race, and place of birth, representing the quantitative outcome of the record.

year.year: The calendar year for which the professional density is reported, serving as the primary time reference for each record.

level_1.level_1: The type of health professional (e.g., Dentists, Doctors, Nurses) measured per 10,000 total population, categorizing the record.

value.value: The numeric count of the specified health professional per 10,000 total population for the given year, representing the measurement of professional density.

year.year: The calendar year indicating when the reported number of companies operated within the specified artform, serving as a temporal attribute for the artform entity.

artform.artform: The type or category of artistic discipline (e.g., Literary Arts, Visual Arts, Music) being reported, acting as the primary subject identifier for each record.

companies.companies: The count of companies operating in the specified artform during the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of industry presence.

academic_year.academic_year: The year in which the course was offered, indicating the temporal context of the course offering.

jae_cluster.jae_cluster: The academic cluster or department to which the course belongs, categorizing the course within the institution's structure.

jae_course_code.jae_course_code: A unique alphanumeric code that identifies each course offering, serving as the primary key for referencing the course.

course_name.course_name: The official title of the course, describing the subject matter and level of study.

gceo_cut_off_point.gceo_cut_off_point: The minimum cutoff score required for admission to the course, expressed as a numeric value or range.

calendar_year.calendar_year: The year for which the data is reported, serving as the primary key for each record.

indicator_type.indicator_type: A descriptor indicating the metric being measured; in this table it consistently represents the number of registered LPAs.

value.value: The numeric count of registered LPAs for the given year, formatted with commas for readability.

year.year: The calendar year for which the value is recorded, indicating the temporal context of the measurement.

level_1.level_1: The category or sector being measured (e.g., Education, Arts & Heritage). It serves as the primary identifier for each record, representing the main subject of the dataset.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the category in that year, representing the quantity or count for that sector.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper in which the article was published, describing the source of the article.

issue_id.issue_id: A reference to the specific issue of the newspaper that contains the article, linking the article to its issue.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the issue, indicating when the article was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the issue, providing context about the issue’s sequence.

page_id.page_id: An identifier for the page within the issue where the article appears, linking the article to its page.

page_number.page_number: The numeric page number of the article within the issue, indicating its position.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for each article, serving as the primary key for the article entity.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, summarizing its content.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article’s text, giving a brief excerpt of its content.

post_secondary_course.post_secondary_course: The name of a post-secondary course type, serving as the primary identifier for each course category in the dataset.

year.year: The calendar year associated with the recorded percentage, indicating the time point for the measurement of the course's participation.

percentage.percentage: The proportion (in percent) of students enrolled in the specified course type during the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of course uptake.

year.year: The calendar year for which the math pass percentage is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

race.race: The racial or ethnic group classification for which the math pass percentage is measured, acting as a categorical attribute of the year.

percentage_pass_math.percentage_pass_math: The percentage of students who passed mathematics in the specified year and race group, representing a quantitative measurement of academic performance.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which case data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

case_type.case_type: The classification of the case (e.g., Mutual Agreement Procedure, Advance Pricing Arrangement) associated with the financial year, describing the type of case handled.

status.status: The current status of the case (e.g., Balance brought forward, Completed) indicating the case's progress within the financial year.

no_of_cases.no_of_cases: The numeric count of cases for the given financial year, case type, and status, representing the number of cases recorded (positive or negative values indicate net changes).

percentage_psle_mtl.percentage_psle_mtl: The percentage of students achieving the PSLE MTL benchmark in the specified year and race group, representing a quantitative performance metric.

level_2.level_2: The specific SSIC subcategory, such as 'SSIC 471 - General Merchandise', identifying the type of retail trade establishment being counted.
