shs.shs: Represents the year of the housing survey, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

flat_type.flat_type: Describes the type of flat (e.g., 1-room, 2-room, Executive) associated with the year, acting as an attribute of the main subject.

no_of_income_earners.no_of_income_earners: Indicates the number of income earners in the flat (e.g., 1 person, 2 persons, 4 or more persons), an attribute of the main subject; values may be missing.

percentage.percentage: Shows the percentage of households or units that fall into the specified flat type and income earner category for that year, a quantitative measurement linked to the main subject.

year.year: The calendar year for which vessel statistics are reported, serving as the primary key for each record.

number_of_vessels.number_of_vessels: The total count of vessels operating in that year, indicating the fleet size for the specified year.

gross_tonnage.gross_tonnage: The combined gross tonnage of all vessels in that year, representing the total vessel capacity for the specified year.

quarter.quarter: A unique identifier for each time period, formatted as year and quarter (e.g., 1979-Q4), serving as the primary key for the dataset.

level_1.level_1: The category of property being measured, here consistently 'Residential Properties', describing the type of asset for each quarter.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the quarter and property category, representing a quantitative metric (e.g., value in millions) for that time period.

year.year: Represents the calendar year for which the humidity statistics are reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

rh_mean_daily.rh_mean_daily: The average daily relative humidity percentage for the specified year, indicating typical moisture levels.

rh_mean_daily_minimum.rh_mean_daily_minimum: The lowest recorded daily relative humidity percentage during the year, showing the minimum moisture level observed.

rh_means_daily_maximum.rh_means_daily_maximum: The highest recorded daily relative humidity percentage during the year, indicating the maximum moisture level observed.

year.year: The calendar year indicating when the population count was recorded, acting as a temporal attribute related to the age group.

population_by_age_group.population_by_age_group: The age group category (e.g., '75 & above', '50-59') representing the demographic segment being measured; it serves as the primary entity of the table.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals in the specified age group for the given year, providing the quantitative measurement of that demographic segment.

year.year: The calendar year for which the sick leave proportion data is reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: The primary industry sector category, indicating the broader industry classification (e.g., services) associated with the record.

industry2.industry2: The sub-industry or specific sector within the primary industry, providing a more detailed classification of the employment context.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The type of sick leave being measured (e.g., hospitalisation leave, outpatient sick leave), categorizing the nature of the leave.

proportion.proportion: The numeric proportion (likely percentage) representing the share of employees on the specified sick leave type within the given industry and year.

maritialstatus.maritialstatus: The respondent’s marital status (e.g., Married, Single). It is an attribute of the respondent.

ban_q30_3.ban_q30_3: A survey response to question 30.3, likely a statement about expressing views; it describes the respondent’s opinion.

ban_occupation_status5.ban_occupation_status5: The respondent’s occupation status category 5 (e.g., employee, student). It is a demographic attribute.

socialnetwork_dp06.socialnetwork_dp06: A response to a social‑networking question (dp06), indicating the respondent’s engagement or opinion.

children.children: Indicates whether the respondent has children (Yes/No). It is a demographic attribute.

ban_no_ofchildren.ban_no_ofchildren: The number of children the respondent has (e.g., Net - 2-3 children). It quantifies a demographic attribute.

q20_q213.q20_q213: Response to question 20.213, likely a preference or ranking; it describes the respondent’s choice.

livinginsg_1_slice.livinginsg_1_slice: A slice of living‑in‑situ data (e.g., Agree/Disagree). It is an attribute of the respondent’s living situation.

ban_q32.ban_q32: Response to question 32, possibly a statement about expression; it reflects the respondent’s opinion.

ban_occupation_role1.ban_occupation_role1: The respondent’s primary occupation role (e.g., Employee, Housewife). It is a demographic attribute.

socialnetwork_4_slice.socialnetwork_4_slice: Response to social‑network question 4; indicates the respondent’s engagement level.

ban_occupation_status9.ban_occupation_status9: Occupation status category 9 (e.g., Retiree). It is a demographic attribute.

ban_personal_inc.ban_personal_inc: The respondent’s personal income bracket (e.g., Low, Medium). It quantifies economic status.

ban_age_youngest.ban_age_youngest: Age of the respondent’s youngest child (e.g., 7 to 12 years old). It is a demographic attribute.

socialnetwork_6_slice.socialnetwork_6_slice: Response to social‑network question 6; indicates engagement or opinion.

socialnetwork_1_slice.socialnetwork_1_slice: Response to social‑network question 1; reflects the respondent’s stance or usage.

livinginsg_4_slice.livinginsg_4_slice: Living‑in‑situ slice 4 response; indicates a specific aspect of the respondent’s living situation.

ban_education2.ban_education2: Education level category 2 (e.g., Secondary school). It is a demographic attribute.

indicateage.indicateage: The respondent’s age range (e.g., 25‑34 years old). It is a demographic attribute.

childage.childage: Age range of the respondent’s children (e.g., 7 to 12 years old). It is a demographic attribute.

ban_gender.ban_gender: The respondent’s gender (Male/Female). It is a demographic attribute.

md_segment.md_segment: Market‑development segment classification (e.g., Harm_Care). It categorizes the respondent’s market segment.

sliderliberty_1_slice.sliderliberty_1_slice: Response to a liberty slider question; indicates the respondent’s stance on liberty.

total_grants_awarded.total_grants_awarded: The total monetary amount awarded under the grant call, representing the funding disbursed to successful proposals.

industry1.industry1: The industry sector (e.g., manufacturing, construction, services, others) associated with the employment change, categorizing the economic activity.

level_1.level_1: Denotes the demographic group (e.g., ethnicity and gender) of divorcees, categorizing the data by group for each year.

level_2.level_2: Specifies the age range of the divorcees within the demographic group, providing age-based segmentation of the statistics.

value.value: Indicates the count of divorcees in the specified demographic group and age range for the given year, representing the measured quantity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the distribution data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

industry1.industry1: The top-level industry classification (e.g., services) that categorizes the economic sector related to the distribution data, linked to the year.

industry2.industry2: The second-level industry classification providing a more specific sector within the top-level industry, associated with the year.

industry3.industry3: The third-level industry classification offering detailed sub-sector information within the second-level industry, tied to the year.

annual_leave_entitlement.annual_leave_entitlement: The range of annual leave entitlement (e.g., '15 to 21 days', 'over 21 days', '14 days & below') describing the leave policy category for the industry group, related to the year.

distribution.distribution: The percentage distribution value indicating the proportion of entities within the specified industry and leave entitlement category for that year.

year.year: The calendar year for which enrolment data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the enrolment group, indicating whether the data pertains to females (F) or mixed gender (MF) cohorts.

enrolment_pri_4.enrolment_pri_4: The number of students enrolled in primary school grade 4 during the specified year and gender group, representing a quantitative measure of enrolment.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the survey, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

ethnic_group.ethnic_group: The ethnic group classification of individuals surveyed in that year, describing a characteristic of the main subject.

economically_active_status.economically_active_status: The employment status (e.g., Employed, Unemployed) of individuals in that year, categorizing the main subject.

no.no: The count of individuals belonging to the specified ethnic group and employment status in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement.

start_year.start_year: The starting year of the period for which flat demand is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each time interval.

end_year.end_year: The ending year of the period, indicating the time span of the demand data.

flat_type.flat_type: The category of flats (e.g., rental or home ownership) for which demand is measured, describing the type of housing.

demand_for_flats.demand_for_flats: The total number of flats demanded during the specified period and type, representing the quantitative measure of housing demand.

year.year: The calendar year when the enrolment and staff data were recorded, indicating the time context for the institution's statistics.

institution.institution: The name of the educational institution, uniquely identifying the primary entity being described.

mode.mode: The operational mode of the institution (e.g., Full-Time, Part-Time, Full-Time & Part-Time), categorizing how the school functions.

sex.sex: The gender composition of the enrolment (MF for mixed, F for female-only), classifying the student body.

enrolment.enrolment: The total number of students enrolled at the institution during the specified year, measuring student population.

teaching_staff.teaching_staff: The number of teaching staff employed by the institution in that year, indicating staffing levels.

year.year: The calendar year for which employment data is reported, serving as the primary time reference for the dataset.

type.type: The category of the arts industry, indicating whether the employment figures pertain to Recorded Music or Live Performing Arts.

employment.employment: The number of individuals employed in the specified industry type during the given year, representing a quantitative measure of employment.

quarter.quarter: A time period identifier indicating the fiscal quarter (e.g., 2018-Q2) for which allocation data is recorded; serves as the primary key for the main subject.

allocation_mode.allocation_mode: Describes the method or category of allocation applied in that quarter, such as Direct Allocation or Tender/ Launches; an attribute of the main subject.

gross_allocation.gross_allocation: The monetary amount allocated in that quarter under the specified allocation mode, expressed in units (e.g., 27.5); a measurement value of the main subject.

24-hr_psi.24-hr_psi: Timestamp indicating the date and time of the 24‑hour pressure measurement, serving as the primary key for each record.

north.north: Pressure value (in psi) measured at the northern location during the recorded time, an attribute of the main observation.

south.south: Pressure value (in psi) measured at the southern location during the recorded time, an attribute of the main observation.

east.east: Pressure value (in psi) measured at the eastern location during the recorded time, an attribute of the main observation.

west.west: Pressure value (in psi) measured at the western location during the recorded time, an attribute of the main observation.

central.central: Pressure value (in psi) measured at the central location during the recorded time, an attribute of the main observation.

financial_year.financial_year: Represents the fiscal year for which return data is reported, serving as the primary entity identifier for the dataset.

tax_type.tax_type: Specifies the type of tax applicable, such as Goods & Services Tax, describing a characteristic of the fiscal year record.

return_type.return_type: Indicates the category of return processed (e.g., Returns Issued, Returns Received, Returns Received on Time), describing a property of the fiscal year record.

no_of_returns.no_of_returns: The quantitative count of returns corresponding to the specified fiscal year, tax type, and return category, measuring the volume of returns.

year.year: The calendar year for which the life expectancy data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

sex.sex: The biological sex of the population group, categorizing the life expectancy data for each year.

hale_years.hale_years: The average number of years lived (life expectancy) for the specified year and sex, representing the measurement of longevity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the financial metric is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical description of the financial metric and industry classification, indicating whether the figure represents Operating Receipts or Operating Surplus for SSIC 86 – Total Health Services.

value.value: The monetary amount (in the table’s currency) associated with the specified metric for that year.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The fiscal year for which income is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

income_type.income_type: The classification of income (e.g., Interest, Rents, Dividends) associated with the specified year, describing the source of earnings.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the income for the given type and year, representing the amount earned.

year.year: The calendar year when the road length measurement was recorded, indicating the time context for the data.

road_type.road_type: The classification of the road (e.g., Local Road, Arterial Road, Expressway, Collector Road), serving as the primary identifier for the road category being described.

road_length.road_length: The total length of the specified road type in the given year, measured in units (likely meters or kilometers), representing the quantitative extent of that road category.

year.year: The calendar year during which the retrenchment incidence was recorded, indicating the time context for the measurement.

occupation1.occupation1: The name of the occupation group being analyzed, serving as the primary entity for the dataset.

incidence_of_retrenchment.incidence_of_retrenchment: The percentage of workers in the specified occupation group who were retrenched during the given year, representing the key measurement of retrenchment incidence.

shs_year.shs_year: The year of the survey, serving as the primary dimension for the demographic data.

elderly_pop.elderly_pop: The population group category (Elderly or Future Elderly) describing the segment of the population being measured.

sex.sex: The gender classification (All, Female, Male) of the population segment.

marital_status.marital_status: The marital status category (Married, Widowed, Divorced/Separated, Single) of the population segment.

percentage.percentage: The percentage value representing the proportion of the specified population group, sex, and marital status within the total population for that year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrollment and graduation data are reported, indicating the time period of the cohort.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the cohort, denoting whether the data pertains to male, female, or mixed groups.

course.course: The name of the academic program or discipline being reported, serving as the primary entity for the dataset.

intake.intake: The number of new students admitted into the course during that year, representing the cohort size at entry.

enrolment.enrolment: The total number of students enrolled in the course during that year, reflecting the active student body.

graduates.graduates: The number of students who completed the course and graduated in that year, indicating the cohort's completion rate.

year.year: The calendar year for which the median duration is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The category or metric name, indicating that the value represents the 'Median Duration' of the measured entity.

value.value: The numeric measurement of the median duration (in unspecified units) associated with the given year and category.

year.year: The calendar year during which the births were recorded, serving as the primary grouping dimension for the dataset.

father_race.father_race: The race of the father in the birth records, categorizing the paternal lineage for each birth count entry.

mother_race.mother_race: The race of the mother in the birth records, categorizing the maternal lineage for each birth count entry.

birth_count.birth_count: The number of births recorded for the specific combination of year, father race, and mother race, representing the quantitative measure of births.

period.period: The reporting period (year-month) for which the ARV count is recorded, indicating the time dimension of the data.

region.region: The geographic region classification of the country, providing contextual grouping for analysis.

con.con: The country name, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

arv_count.arv_count: The numeric count of ARV units or cases associated with the country during the specified period, representing a quantitative measure.

year.year: The calendar year during which the student examinations were conducted, serving as the primary temporal identifier for the records.

age_group.age_group: A categorical label indicating the educational age group of the students examined, describing the demographic segment.

no_of_students_examined.no_of_students_examined: The measured count of students who were examined in the specified year and age group, representing the quantity of examined students.

issuing_authority_identifier.issuing_authority_identifier: The identifier of the authority that issued the UEN, indicating the regulatory body responsible for the entity.

uen.uen: A unique identifier for each business entity, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

entity_name.entity_name: The legal name of the entity, describing what the business is called.

entity_type_description.entity_type_description: A classification of the entity type, such as Local Company, Business, or LLP.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: The legal constitution of the entity, e.g., Sole Proprietor or partnership.

entity_status_description.entity_status_description: The current status of the entity, such as Live, Struck Off, or Ceased Registration.

registration_incorporation_date.registration_incorporation_date: The date the entity was incorporated, indicating when it was legally established.

uen_issue_date.uen_issue_date: The date the UEN was issued to the entity, marking the start of its official registration.

address_type.address_type: The type of address registered for the entity, typically LOCAL.

block.block: The block number of the entity’s registered address.

street_name.street_name: The street name of the entity’s registered address.

level_no.level_no: The level number within the building for the entity’s registered address.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number within the building for the entity’s registered address.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the entity is registered.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code of the entity’s registered address.

no_of_charges.no_of_charges: The number of charges registered against the entity, indicating financial encumbrances.

primary_ssic_code.primary_ssic_code: The primary Standard Industrial Classification code for the entity’s main business activity.

primary_ssic_description.primary_ssic_description: A description of the primary SSIC code, detailing the main industry sector.

secondary_ssic_code.secondary_ssic_code: The secondary SSIC code for the entity’s secondary business activity.

secondary_ssic_description.secondary_ssic_description: A description of the secondary SSIC code, detailing the secondary industry sector.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The number of officers associated with the entity, indicating its governance structure.

year.year: The calendar year during which new admissions were recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

age.age: The age group classification of the admitted individuals for that year, describing the demographic segment of the admissions.

new_admissions.new_admissions: The count of new admissions for the specified age group in the given year, representing the quantitative measure of admissions.

year.year: The calendar year for which the health service establishment count is reported, serving as the primary key for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical descriptor indicating the type of establishments, specifically total health services under SSIC 86, providing context for the measurement.

value.value: The numeric count of establishments in the specified category for the given year, representing the measured quantity.

quarter.quarter: Represents a specific fiscal quarter (e.g., 2015-Q1), indicating the time period for which the data is recorded.

housing_schm_type.housing_schm_type: Describes the type of housing scheme (e.g., Residential Properties Scheme, Public Housing Scheme) associated with the quarter, categorizing the source of the net withdrawal amount.

net_wdl_amt.net_wdl_amt: The net withdrawal amount in monetary units for the specified quarter and housing scheme type, quantifying the financial value of withdrawals during that period.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper in which the article was published, describing the source of the article.

issue_id.issue_id: An identifier linking the article to its specific issue, serving as a foreign key to the issue entity.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the issue, indicating when the article was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the issue, specifying the particular edition of the newspaper.

page_id.page_id: An identifier for the page containing the article, referencing the page entity.

page_number.page_number: The numeric page number where the article appears within the issue.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for each article, serving as the primary key for the article entity.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, summarizing its main topic.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article’s text, providing a brief excerpt of its content.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

sector.sector: The type of practice sector (e.g., Public, Private, Not In Active Practice) associated with the year, describing the organizational context.

specialist_non-specialist.specialist_non-specialist: A categorical indicator specifying whether the professionals counted are Specialists or Non‑Specialists, providing a classification of expertise level.

count.count: The numeric count of professionals or cases for the given year, sector, and specialist status, representing the measured quantity.

ban_q32.ban_q32: Type of business relationship or respondent category (e.g., T2B, B2B, Neutral), serving as the primary identifier for each respondent.

ban_q435.ban_q435: Binary indicator (Yes/No) of a specific feature or behavior associated with the respondent.

ban_education4.ban_education4: Education level indicator, where '-' may represent missing or unspecified and 'No' indicates absence of a certain qualification; an attribute of the respondent.

socialnetwork_dp05.socialnetwork_dp05: Binary indicator of whether the respondent uses social network dp05; an attribute of the respondent.

ban_q431.ban_q431: Binary indicator (always 'No' in the sample) representing a particular respondent attribute or status.

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: Binary indicator of whether the respondent uses social network 5_slice; an attribute of the respondent.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: Binary indicator (Yes/No) of another respondent attribute or behavior.

year.year: The calendar year indicating when the courses were offered, acting as a temporal attribute of the category.

category.category: The name of a music or performing arts category, serving as the primary entity that identifies each group of courses.

courses.courses: The number of courses available in the specified category during the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of course offerings.

device_name.device_name: The commercial or common name of the medical device, describing what the device is called.

description.description: A detailed textual description of the device’s purpose, features, and intended use.

gmdn.gmdn: The Global Medical Device Nomenclature code that uniquely identifies the device type in an international standard.

medical_speciality_area.medical_speciality_area: The medical specialty area (e.g., Ophthalmology, Hematology) in which the device is intended to be used.

hs_code.hs_code: The Harmonized System code used for customs classification of the device.

hsa_product_code.hsa_product_code: The Health Sciences Authority product code assigned to the device for regulatory purposes.

medical_device_class.medical_device_class: The regulatory classification (e.g., CLASS B, CLASS C) indicating the device’s risk level.

device_registration_number.device_registration_number: A unique identifier for the device registration, serving as the primary key for the record.

registration_date.registration_date: The date on which the device was officially registered.

change_nfy_approval_date.change_nfy_approval_date: The date when a change notification for the device was approved.

expiry_date.expiry_date: The date when the device registration expires.

product_owner_name.product_owner_name: The full legal name of the entity that owns the product.

product_owner_short_name.product_owner_short_name: An abbreviated or short form of the product owner’s name.

product_owner_address.product_owner_address: The physical address of the product owner.

registrant_name.registrant_name: The name of the entity that performed the device registration.

registrant_address.registrant_address: The physical address of the registrant.

imported_by_name.imported_by_name: The name of the entity that imported the device.

imported_by_address.imported_by_address: The physical address of the importer.

models_name.models_name: A list of model names or variants associated with the device.

identifier.identifier: Additional identifiers or internal codes linked to the device.

identifier_uuid.identifier_uuid: A unique identifier for each record, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

identifier_uri.identifier_uri: A URI that links to an external resource representing the same item, acting as a foreign key.

title.title: The main title of the item, describing its primary name.

alternative_title.alternative_title: An alternate or secondary title for the item, providing additional naming options.

contributor.contributor: The person or organization that contributed to the creation or compilation of the item.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The entity that published the digital version of the item.

date_created.date_created: The date on which the item was created, indicating its temporal origin.

description.description: A detailed textual description of the item’s content and context.

abstract.abstract: A concise summary of the item’s content, offering a quick overview.

subject_lcsh.subject_lcsh: Subject heading from Library of Congress Subject Headings, categorizing the item.

subject_singheritage.subject_singheritage: Subject classification from Singapore Heritage, providing local thematic context.

language.language: The language in which the item is presented.

ispartof_collections.ispartof_collections: Hierarchical path indicating the collections or series the item belongs to.

nlb_type.nlb_type: The type of item as classified by the National Library Board, indicating its format or genre.

rights.rights: Copyright statement specifying ownership and usage rights for the item.

access_rights.access_rights: Usage restrictions or permissions governing how the item may be accessed or reproduced.

level_of_school.level_of_school: The educational level at which the teachers are employed, such as PRIMARY, SECONDARY, or PRE-UNIVERSITY.

age.age: The age range of the teachers, expressed as a group (e.g., 35 - 39, 55 & ABOVE).

no_of_teachers.no_of_teachers: The number of teachers in the specified group, serving as the primary measurement of teacher counts for each combination of year, sex, level_of_school, and age.

year.year: The calendar year for which the infrastructure count is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

facility.facility: The type of vehicular infrastructure (e.g., Bridges, Flyovers, Underpasses & Tunnels) represented in the record, describing the category of the counted structures.

number.number: The numeric count of the specified facility type present in the given year, indicating the quantity of that infrastructure.

quarter.quarter: The fiscal quarter during which the allocation and supply figures apply, indicating the time period for the product segment.

product_segment.product_segment: The name of the product segment or development area, serving as the primary identifier for each row in the dataset.

total_allocated.total_allocated: The total amount of resources allocated to the product segment in the specified quarter, representing the planned investment or capacity.

supply.supply: The actual supply or available resources for the product segment in that quarter, indicating the realized capacity or output.

month.month: The month and year (in YYYY-MM format) indicating when the drop call rate was recorded for a telco, serving as a temporal reference for the measurement.

telco.telco: The name of the telecommunications provider, acting as the primary entity for which the drop call rate is reported.

drop_call_rate.drop_call_rate: The proportion of dropped calls relative to total calls for the specified telco in the given month, expressed as a decimal value.

shs_year.shs_year: Represents the year of the survey, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

flat_type.flat_type: Describes the type of flat (e.g., 1-room, 5-room) associated with the year, categorizing the housing unit.

type_of_family_nucleus.type_of_family_nucleus: Indicates the family nucleus classification (e.g., Nuclear, Multi-nuclear) for the given year and flat type.

percentage.percentage: Shows the percentage of households that fall into the specified flat type and family nucleus category for that year; may be missing for some records.

year.year: The calendar year for which the establishment count is reported, indicating the time period of the data.

level_1.level_1: A constant descriptor indicating the overall category of licensed food establishments, serving as a contextual label for the data.

level_2.level_2: The specific type of food establishment (e.g., Supermarkets, Food Factories, Food Stalls, Private Markets) being counted, identifying the entity of interest.

value.value: The numeric count of licensed food establishments of the specified type in the given year, representing the measurement of that category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the enrollment rate is reported, serving as the primary time reference for the data.

level_of_education.level_of_education: The educational attainment level (e.g., lower secondary, upper secondary) associated with the enrollment rate for that year, categorizing the data by schooling stage.

sex.sex: The gender group for which the enrollment rate is calculated, with values such as M (male), F (female), or MF (both sexes combined).

total_net_enrolment_rate.total_net_enrolment_rate: The percentage of eligible students enrolled in the specified education level and sex group for the given year, representing the net enrollment rate.

year.year: Represents the calendar year for which the web presence data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record in this table.

employment_size.employment_size: Describes the size category of the organization (e.g., below 10 employees, between 10 to 199 employees, 200 or more employees) for the corresponding year, acting as a categorical attribute of the main subject.

web_presence.web_presence: Indicates the number of organizations with a web presence within the specified employment size category for that year, functioning as a quantitative measurement of web presence.

street_name.street_name: The name of the street, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

issuance_agency_id.issuance_agency_id: The agency that issued the UEN, indicating the authority responsible for the entity; it is a categorical attribute of the street record.

uen.uen: The Unique Entity Number assigned by the issuing agency, acting as a foreign key that references a specific business entity associated with the street.
A unique identifier for each business entity, serving as the primary key for identifying individual companies.

business_constitution_description.business_constitution_description: Describes the legal structure of the business (e.g., Sole Proprietor, Partnership), an attribute of the business entity.

no_of_officers.no_of_officers: The count of officers within the business, a quantitative attribute of the entity.

address_type.address_type: Specifies the type of address associated with the business, here indicating a local address; a categorical attribute of the entity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

capacity.capacity: A categorical range indicating the capacity classification associated with the year, describing the size or capacity group for that record.

number.number: The numeric count or quantity corresponding to the year and capacity range, representing the measured value for that category.

gender.gender: The sex classification (Male or Female) associated with the record, describing the demographic group for which the measurement applies.

asir.asir: A numeric value representing the measured quantity (e.g., a statistical index) for the specified year and gender.

year.year: The calendar year for which the metric is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical label indicating the type or group associated with the record, such as 'Total', 'Chinese', or 'Inter-Ethnic'.

value.value: The numeric measurement or count corresponding to the specified year and category.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year during which the units were recorded, indicating the time period for the measurement.

category.category: The type of infrastructure or facility being counted, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the table.

no_of_units.no_of_units: The number of units of the specified category present in the given financial year, representing the quantitative count for that period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the sick leave statistics are reported, serving as the primary dimension for the data.

sick_leave.sick_leave: The category of sick leave (e.g., hospitalisation leave, outpatient sick leave) associated with the statistics for that year.

avg_days_per_employee.avg_days_per_employee: The average number of sick leave days per employee for the specified sick leave type in the given year, reflecting overall employee absenteeism.

category.category: A classification indicating the geographic or functional area of the carpark, such as 'South & CBD' or 'East'.

year.year: The calendar year during which the arrest data was recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for the dataset.

no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested.no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested: The count of inhalant abusers arrested in the specified year, status, and age group, representing the quantitative measurement of arrests.

year.year: The calendar year for which the proportion of charities is reported, serving as the primary time reference for the data.

income_size.income_size: The income bracket category of charities (e.g., <$250k, $500k to $1 mil, $1mil to $5 mil, $5mil to $10 mil, >$10 mil), describing the financial classification of the charities within that year.

proportion_of_charities.proportion_of_charities: The proportion (as a decimal) of charities falling into the specified income bracket for the given year, representing the relative share of charities in that income category.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population count is recorded, indicating the time period of the data for the age group.

population_by_age_group.population_by_age_group: The age group classification (e.g., '19 & below', '50-59', '75 & above') representing the demographic segment being counted.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The count of individuals belonging to the specified age group in the given year, representing the quantitative measure of that demographic segment.

year.year: The calendar year for which employment data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

nature_of_employment.nature_of_employment: The classification of employees (e.g., full‑time, part‑time, all) for the reported year, indicating the employment type considered.

total_paid_hours.total_paid_hours: The aggregate number of hours paid to employees in that year, representing overall labor compensation.

standard_hours.standard_hours: The standard or expected number of working hours per employee for that year, indicating baseline work time.

overtime_of_all_employees.overtime_of_all_employees: The total overtime hours worked by all employees in that year, measuring additional work beyond standard hours.

overtime_of_employees_who_worked_overtim.overtime_of_employees_who_worked_overtim: The total overtime hours worked by employees who actually performed overtime in that year, indicating overtime activity among those who worked extra hours.

year.year: The calendar year during which the reported percentage applies, indicating the time context for the cause group data.

broad_cause_group.broad_cause_group: The name of a broad category of health conditions, serving as the primary identifier for each row in the table.

percentage.percentage: The proportion (as a percentage) of the total that is attributed to the corresponding broad cause group in the specified year.

year.year: The calendar year for which the arrest data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

status.status: A classification indicating whether the arrest count represents a total or new count for the year, describing the nature of the data.

no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested.no_of_inhalant_abusers_arrested: The count of individuals arrested for inhalant abuse in the specified year, status, and race, representing the quantitative measurement of arrests.

session_code.session_code: The session type (e.g., single session) indicating the school's daily schedule.

shs_year.shs_year: The year associated with the recorded data, indicating the time period for the town's statistic.

town_estate.town_estate: The name of a town or estate, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

number.number: A numeric value representing a count or measurement related to the town for the specified year.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: The fiscal year for which the tax assessment data is reported, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

tax_group.tax_group: The classification of the tax group (e.g., Taxable Group or Non-Taxable Group) associated with the assessment for that year.

no_of_companies_assessed.no_of_companies_assessed: The count of companies that were assessed under the specified tax group in the given year.

total_income.total_income: The aggregate income reported by all assessed companies in the tax group for that year.

donations.donations: The total amount of donations reported by the assessed companies in the tax group during the year.

ci_before_reliefs_exemption.ci_before_reliefs_exemption: Corporate income before applying reliefs and exemptions for the tax group in that year.

group_relief.group_relief: The amount of group relief applied to the corporate income of the tax group for that year.

loss_carryback_relief.loss_carryback_relief: The relief granted for loss carryback applied to the tax group in that year.

tax_exemption.tax_exemption: The total tax exemption amount applicable to the tax group for that year.

ci.ci: Corporate income after reliefs and exemptions for the tax group in the given year.

gross_tax_payable.gross_tax_payable: The total gross tax payable by the tax group before deductions in that year.

tax_deducted_at_source.tax_deducted_at_source: The amount of tax deducted at source from the tax group’s income in that year.

other_tax_set_offs.other_tax_set_offs: Other tax set-offs applied to the tax group’s payable tax in that year.

net_tax_assessed.net_tax_assessed: The final net tax assessed for the tax group after all deductions and set-offs in that year.

year.year: The calendar year when the deaths occurred, providing a temporal context for the death count.

marital_status.marital_status: The marital status of the deceased (e.g., SINGLE, MARRIED, DIVORCED, UNKNOWN), categorizing the deaths by relationship status.

death_age_group.death_age_group: The age range of the deceased (e.g., 20 - 29, 70 - 79, 80 and Over), grouping deaths by age group.

gender.gender: The gender of the deceased (M or F), classifying deaths by sex.

death_count.death_count: The number of deaths recorded for the specific combination of year, marital status, age group, and gender, serving as the primary measurement of the table.

shs_year.shs_year: The year in which the percentage data was collected, indicating the temporal context for the occupation group.

age.age: The age range of individuals within the occupation group, categorizing the demographic segment.

occupation.occupation: The name of the occupational group being described, serving as the primary entity for each record.

percentage.percentage: The proportion (in percent) of the population represented by the occupation group for the specified year and age range.

1hr_pm2.5.1hr_pm2.5: A timestamp indicating when the PM2.5 measurements were recorded, serving as the primary key for each observation.

north.north: The PM2.5 concentration measured at the northern location during the recorded hour.

south.south: The PM2.5 concentration measured at the southern location during the recorded hour.

east.east: The PM2.5 concentration measured at the eastern location during the recorded hour.

west.west: The PM2.5 concentration measured at the western location during the recorded hour.

central.central: The PM2.5 concentration measured at the central location during the recorded hour.

financial_year.financial_year: The fiscal year for which the expenditure data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

actual_revised_estimated.actual_revised_estimated: A categorical indicator of whether the reported amount is Actual, Revised, or Estimated.

sector.sector: The broad sector classification (e.g., Government Administration, Security and External Relations) associated with the expenditure.

ministry.ministry: The specific ministry or department responsible for the expenditure within the sector.

type.type: The nature of the expenditure, such as Operating or Development.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the expenditure in the given fiscal year, measured in the local currency.

percent_of_gdp.percent_of_gdp: The proportion of the expenditure relative to the country's GDP, expressed as a decimal.

year.year: The calendar year for which the admission data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The type of healthcare facility (e.g., Community Hospitals Admissions, Specialist Outpatient Clinics) associated with the admissions count, describing the category of the main subject.

value.value: The numeric count of admissions for the specified facility type in the given year, representing the measured quantity of patient visits (may be missing for some records).

year_of_balance.year_of_balance: The fiscal year for which the financial data is reported, serving as the primary temporal reference for each record.

actual_revised_estimated.actual_revised_estimated: A categorical indicator specifying whether the reported amount is an actual figure, a revised estimate, or an estimated value for the given year.

category.category: The classification of the financial entry (e.g., Expenditure, Balance) that groups similar items within the fiscal year.

item.item: The specific financial item or line item being reported, such as 'Capitalisation of Nationally Significant Infrastructure' or 'Depreciation of Nationally Significant Infrastructure'.

amount.amount: The monetary value associated with the item for that year, expressed in the relevant currency units.

percent_of_gdp.percent_of_gdp: The proportion of the item's amount relative to the country's GDP, expressed as a decimal fraction.

year_of_assessment.year_of_assessment: Represents the fiscal year for which income is reported, serving as the primary entity for each record in the table.

income_type.income_type: Describes the category of income (e.g., Interest, Dividends, Royalties, Trade Income) associated with the specified year, acting as an attribute of the main subject.

amount.amount: The monetary value of the income for the given type and year, providing a quantitative measurement of earnings.

year.year: The calendar year for which the energy data is reported, serving as the primary temporal reference for each record.

energy_products.energy_products: The main category of energy product (e.g., Natural Gas, Petroleum Products) associated with the record, describing the type of energy source.

sub_products.sub_products: The specific subcategory or product within the main energy category (e.g., Pipeline NG, Gasoline) that the value refers to.

value_ktoe.value_ktoe: The quantified amount of the specified energy product in kilotonnes of oil equivalent (ktoe), representing the measurement of energy volume for that year and product.

date_issued.date_issued: The date on which the project was issued, indicating when the project was approved or recorded.

top_number.top_number: A unique numeric identifier for each project, serving as the primary key for the project records.

project_reference_number.project_reference_number: A reference code that uniquely identifies the project, providing an alternative identifier used in official documentation.

description.description: A textual description of the project scope, detailing the work to be undertaken.

achitect.achitect: The name of the architect responsible for the project design.

floor_area.floor_area: The total floor area of the project in square metres, representing the size of the constructed space.

cost.cost: The estimated or actual cost of the project in Singapore dollars, expressed as a monetary value.

residential_units.residential_units: The number of residential units included in the project, indicating the project's housing capacity.

year.year: The calendar year for which the financial metrics are reported, serving as the primary key for each record.

no_of_accounts.no_of_accounts: The total number of active accounts during that year, indicating the size of the account base.

total_balance.total_balance: The aggregate balance held across all accounts in that year, expressed in the same monetary units as the dataset.

average_balance.average_balance: The mean balance per account for the year, calculated as total_balance divided by no_of_accounts.

amount_withdrawn.amount_withdrawn: The total amount withdrawn from all accounts during the year, reflecting cash outflows.

year.year: The calendar year during which the cohort was admitted and tracked, indicating the time period for the course data.

sex.sex: The gender classification of the cohort (e.g., MF for male/female, F for female), providing demographic context for the course enrollment.

degree_course.degree_course: The name of the academic program or degree offered, serving as the primary entity around which enrollment and graduation data are organized.

intake.intake: The number of students admitted into the course during that year, representing the initial cohort size for the program.

enrolment.enrolment: The count of students actually enrolled in the course during that year, reflecting participation levels within the program.

graduates.graduates: The number of students who completed the course and graduated in that year, indicating the program's completion rate.

company_name.company_name: The registered name of the company, describing the entity identified by the UEN.

uen_no.uen_no: A unique identifier for each company, serving as the primary key for this table.

class.class: The builder classification category assigned to the company, such as General Builder Class 1.

class_code.class_code: A short code representing the builder classification, e.g., GB1 for General Builder Class 1.

expiry_date.expiry_date: The date on which the company’s builder license expires, indicating the license validity period.

building_no.building_no: The building number component of the company’s address.

street_name.street_name: The street name component of the company’s address.

unit_no.unit_no: The unit number within the building, if applicable, as part of the address.

building_name.building_name: The name of the building where the company is located, if provided.

postal_code.postal_code: The postal code for the company’s address.

tel_no.tel_no: The telephone number for contacting the company.

year.year: The calendar year for which the measurement is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record in the dataset.

level_1.level_1: A categorical descriptor indicating the type of demographic metric measured (e.g., 'Median Age Of Citizen Population'), providing context for the associated value.

value.value: The numeric measurement (often a decimal) representing the median age for the specified population in the given year; missing entries indicate unavailable data.

month.month: Represents the calendar month during which births were recorded, serving as the primary temporal dimension for the dataset.

weight.weight: Categorizes the newborns' birth weight into ranges (e.g., '2500 - 2999', 'Less than 1000'), describing a key attribute of each birth group.

mother_age.mother_age: Specifies the age range of the mother (e.g., '35 - 39'), providing demographic context for the birth cohort.

gender.gender: Indicates the sex of the newborns ('F' for female, 'M' for male), classifying the births by gender.

birth_count.birth_count: Quantifies the number of births that fall into the corresponding month, weight, mother age, and gender group, serving as the measurement of birth volume.

month.month: The month (YYYY-MM) indicating the time period for which the category count is recorded, serving as a temporal attribute of the category.

category.category: The classification or type of item being counted, representing the main subject of the table.

number.number: The numeric count or quantity associated with the category for the specified month, measuring the category's occurrence or volume.

month.month: The month (in YYYY-MM format) indicating when the value for a specific duty or release type was recorded, serving as a temporal attribute of the type.

type.type: The name of a specific duty, release, or collection category (e.g., 'Duty Paid Releases of Petroleum', 'Duties Collection for Tobacco - Ang Hoon'), representing the primary entity for which monthly values are reported.

value.value: The quantitative amount associated with the type for the given month, expressed in the appropriate units (e.g., thousand decalitres, thousand dollars, kilograms, litres), serving as a measurement of the type's activity.

uid.uid: A unique identifier that serves as the primary key for each digital resource.

book_title.book_title: The title of the resource, describing what the resource is called.

subject.subject: A set of classification tags or categories that describe the content or theme of the resource.

summary.summary: A textual synopsis providing an overview of the resource’s content.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The organization or entity that published the digital resource.

format.format: The format description of the resource, indicating file type and size information.

language.language: The language in which the resource is written or presented.

resource_url.resource_url: The web address where the full digital resource can be accessed.

cover.cover: The URL pointing to the cover image of the resource.

thumbnail.thumbnail: The URL pointing to a smaller thumbnail image of the resource.

quarter.quarter: The fiscal or calendar quarter during which the reported value applies, serving as the primary time-based identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: The highest-level category or classification associated with the quarter, describing the broad sector or restriction type.

level_2.level_2: The second-level subcategory providing more specific context within the level_1 category, such as industry or technology area.

level_3.level_3: The third-level subcategory offering detailed classification within level_2, often indicating a specific product or service segment.

value.value: The quantitative metric recorded for the combination of quarter and hierarchical categories, representing the measured outcome or indicator.

year.year: The calendar year that uniquely identifies each record and serves as the primary key for the mortality statistics.

neonatal_mortality.neonatal_mortality: The count of deaths among newborns within the first 28 days during the specified year, an attribute of the year.

perinatal_mortality.perinatal_mortality: The number of deaths occurring around the time of birth (late fetal and early neonatal deaths) in the given year, an attribute of the year.

maternal_mortality.maternal_mortality: The count of maternal deaths related to pregnancy or childbirth in the specified year, an attribute of the year.

yr.yr: The calendar year during which the claims were recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record in this dataset.

type_of_grounds.type_of_grounds: The classification of the claim basis, indicating whether the claim was due to Permanent incapacity or Death; it describes the type of claim associated with the year.

no_of_claims.no_of_claims: The total number of claims filed in that year for the specified type of grounds, representing the quantitative measure of claims.

year.year: The calendar year for which the crime rate is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: A categorical descriptor indicating the type of crime statistic, specifically 'Overall Crime Rate Per 100,000 Population', providing context for the measurement.

value.value: The numeric value of the overall crime rate per 100,000 population for the given year, representing the measured crime intensity.

year.year: The calendar year in which the membership count was recorded, indicating the time dimension for each category.

category.category: The type of musical or performing arts group (e.g., Instrumental, Dance) that the membership count refers to, serving as the primary entity of the table.

members.members: The number of individuals belonging to the specified category in the given year, representing a quantitative measurement of membership.

month.month: The month (in YYYY-MM format) indicating the time period for which the count is recorded, serving as a temporal attribute of the category.

category.category: The main subject of the dataset, representing the type or classification of vehicles (e.g., Taxis, Category C-ETS) for which the count is reported.

number.number: The quantitative count of items in the specified category for the given month, representing the measurement value.

uid.uid: A unique identifier for each book record, serving as the primary key for the dataset.

book_title.book_title: The title of the book, describing its main subject or theme.

subject.subject: Classification tags that describe the book’s genre, topic, or thematic categories.

summary.summary: A concise description of the book’s content, providing an overview of its narrative or subject matter.

original_publisher.original_publisher: The publisher responsible for the original print edition of the book.

digital_publisher.digital_publisher: The publisher responsible for the digital edition of the book.

format.format: Information about the digital file format and size of the book.

language.language: The language(s) in which the book is written.

copyright.copyright: The copyright statement or holder for the book.

author_name.author_name: The name(s) of the author(s) who wrote the book.

published.published: The publication date of the book, indicating when it was released.

resource_url.resource_url: A URL linking to the digital resource for the book.

cover.cover: A URL to the medium‑size cover image of the book.

thumbnail.thumbnail: A URL to the thumbnail image of the book.

ban_q32.ban_q32: Indicates the type of business relationship, such as B2B, T2B, or Neutral, serving as the primary classification for each record.

socialnetwork_dp02.socialnetwork_dp02: A Yes/No indicator reflecting whether the respondent uses a specific social network platform, describing their social media engagement.

ban_q30_4.ban_q30_4: A categorical response to a survey question, with options like Neutral or T2B, providing additional context about the respondent's perspective.

ban_q435.ban_q435: A binary flag (No) indicating the absence of a particular condition or feature in the respondent's profile.

ban_education4.ban_education4: An education-related attribute, showing whether the respondent has a certain level of education, with values such as Yes, No, or missing (-).

socialnetwork_dp05.socialnetwork_dp05: A binary indicator (No) denoting whether the respondent engages with another social network feature.

ban_q431.ban_q431: A binary flag (No) representing the lack of a specific attribute or behavior in the respondent's data.

socialnetwork_5_slice.socialnetwork_5_slice: A binary indicator (Yes) confirming the respondent's participation in a fifth social network slice or segment.

ban_q18_q192.ban_q18_q192: A binary response (Yes/No) indicating the presence or absence of a particular condition or preference in the respondent's profile.

newspaper_title.newspaper_title: The name of the newspaper in which the article appears, identifying the publication source of the article.

issue_id.issue_id: A unique identifier for the newspaper issue, linking the article to its specific issue.

issue_date.issue_date: The publication date of the issue, indicating when the issue was released.

edition.edition: The edition number of the issue, distinguishing multiple editions within the same issue.

page_id.page_id: A unique identifier for the page, linking the article to its specific page within the issue.

page_number.page_number: The numeric position of the page within the issue, indicating where the article appears.

article_id.article_id: A unique identifier for the article, serving as the primary key for each article record.

article_title.article_title: The headline or title of the article, summarizing its main topic.

article_text_1st50words.article_text_1st50words: The first 50 words of the article's text, providing an excerpt of its content.

year.year: The calendar year in which the participants were counted, indicating the temporal context for the course category.

course_category.course_category: The name of the course category, acting as the primary identifier for each type of course offered.

no_of_participants.no_of_participants: The number of individuals who participated in the course category during the specified year, representing the measurement of participation.

key_uid.key_uid: A unique identifier for the primary entity in each record, serving as the main subject key.

key_descriptor.key_descriptor: A textual description or name of the primary entity, providing its identifying label.

key_vocabulary.key_vocabulary: A categorical tag indicating the type or domain of the primary entity (e.g., _People, _Geographics, _Organisations).

relationship_type.relationship_type: A categorical code that specifies the nature of the relationship between the primary entity and the related entity (e.g., UF, BT, RT, NT).

related_uid.related_uid: A unique identifier for the related entity, acting as a foreign key linking to another entity in the dataset.

related_descriptor.related_descriptor: A textual description or name of the related entity, giving its identifying label.

related_vocabulary.related_vocabulary: A categorical tag indicating the type or domain of the related entity (e.g., _People, _Geographics, _Organisations).

year.year: The calendar year during which the peak system demand was recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record in this dataset.

peak_system_demand_mw.peak_system_demand_mw: The maximum system demand measured in megawatts (MW) for the specified month and year, representing the peak electricity demand during that period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the measurement is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each observation.

level_1.level_1: The category or type of measurement, indicating that the value represents the Rate Of Natural Increase.

value.value: The numeric value of the Rate Of Natural Increase for the specified year, expressed as a percentage.

staff_strength.staff_strength: The number of staff members in the specified executive level and sector for the given year, serving as the quantitative measurement of workforce size.

firm_name.firm_name: The registered name of the architectural firm, uniquely identifying each entity in the dataset.

firm_email.firm_email: The email address associated with the firm, serving as a digital contact point for the architectural entity.

year.year: The calendar year during which the PSLE English performance was recorded, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

year.year: The calendar year for which the population count is recorded, serving as the primary time reference for the dataset.

population_by_gender.population_by_gender: The gender classification (Male or Female) of the population segment being counted, categorizing the data within each year.

number_of_population.number_of_population: The numeric count of individuals in the specified gender group for the given year, representing the population measurement.

month.month: Represents the year and month of the observation, serving as the primary temporal identifier for each record.

level_1.level_1: Describes the category of the measurement, indicating that the value refers to the total of all items excluding motor vehicles.

value.value: The numeric measurement associated with the specified month and category, representing the total value (in unspecified units) for that period.

year.year: The calendar year for which the data is recorded, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

residential_status.residential_status: The type of residential status, indicating whether the property is occupied by residents; in this dataset it is consistently 'resident', describing the category of the property.

ltu_rate.ltu_rate: The Local Tenure Unit rate for the given year, representing a quantitative measure of the rate applied to residential properties.

yr.yr: The calendar year for which the grossed balance data is reported, serving as the primary identifier for each record.

regrossed_bal_amt.regrossed_bal_amt: The monetary amount in the specified currency (likely in units of the dataset) corresponding to the grossed balance group for that year, representing the total value within that range.

year.year: The calendar year for which the flexible working statistics are reported, serving as the primary key for each record.

at_least_one.at_least_one: The percentage of employees who have at least one flexible working arrangement in that year.

part-time.part-time: The percentage of employees working part-time during that year.

flexitime.flexitime: The percentage of employees utilizing flexitime arrangements in that year.

staggered_hours.staggered_hours: The percentage of employees working staggered hours in that year.

homeworking.homeworking: The percentage of employees working from home in that year.

compressed_work_week.compressed_work_week: The percentage of employees working a compressed work week in that year.

no_of_subscriptions.no_of_subscriptions: The number of broadband subscriptions recorded for the specified month and connection type, indicating the subscription volume.

age.age: The age range of the individuals in the labour force group, grouping them into specific age brackets.

labour_force.labour_force: The number of individuals in the labour force for the specified demographic group and year, representing the quantitative measure of employment participation.

fax_no.fax_no: The fax contact number for the company, may be missing for some entries.
